STEP_B branch A vs branch B may pick different serialization (JSON sorted keys vs bincode vs Rust derive order) → cross-branch signature verification fails. Mandatory canonical format closes this.

handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_7_ROUND3_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md:11151:**Out of scope for v1.x spec** (deferred per Codex Q5/NEW-5 round-3 PARTIAL acknowledgment): full golden fixture corpus + differential fuzzing seed + complete runner ABI for QState/SignalBundle/TransitionError. v1.4 freezes the SERIALIZATION RULE (bincode v2 big-endian + BTreeMap lex); fixtures + ABI land in **CO1.1.4-pre1** (canonical fixture corpus) + **CO1.7** (full ABI surface). This is an **explicit deferral** — not unresolved spec ambiguity. STEP_B branch A and branch B both implement the SAME bincode rule; per-tx digest matching is mechanical from v1.4. Full corpus generation is a downstream code task, not spec scope.
handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_7_ROUND3_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md:11541:// PURE transition (used by both branch A and branch B in STEP_B)
handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_7_ROUND3_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md:11722:**Total: 27 invariants → 27 tests** (was 22 in v1.1; +5 in v1.2). Every transition test must pass before CO1.1.4 (bus.rs split) starts. STEP_B implementation comparison is "branch X conforms to spec" / "branch Y conforms to spec", not "branch X looks like branch Y".
handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_7_ROUND3_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md:11775:**Why**: spec § 3 pseudocode is single-threaded; CO P1 may parallelize Phase C 5 modes × N seeds. Without explicit serialization rule, two work_tx can race on same parent_state_root, both pass `I-PARENT`, but produce different (logical_t, tx_id) sequences across STEP_B branches → state_root divergence.
handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_7_ROUND3_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md:11824:**Invariant binding**: `I-CHALLENGE-WINDOW-EDGE` enforces that BOTH transition functions call `is_open(now)` rather than hand-coding the boundary check. STEP_B branch A vs branch B both implement the same `is_open()`; cross-branch comparison verifies identical results for all (opens_at, duration_ticks, now) triples.
handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_7_ROUND3_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md:11835:This means: STEP_B branch A and branch B may serialize threads differently (depending on OS scheduler), but as long as both branches use atomic logical_t assignment + replay from the SAME logical_t sequence, they produce byte-identical state_roots.
handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_7_ROUND3_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md:11886:6. STEP_B implementation: Claude implements branch A against spec; Codex implements branch B against spec; comparison metric = "spec conformance", not "code similarity"
handover/audits/CODEX_CO1_7_ROUND3_AUDIT_2026-04-28.md:11894:- A binding contract for STEP_B branch A/B comparison

handover/audits/EXTERNAL_AUDIT_PROMPT_TB_4_SHIP_TB_5_CHARTER_2026-04-30.md:108:handover/ai-direct/TB-3_RSP1_FORMAL_TX_SURFACE_2026-04-30.md             # TB-3 STEP_B Phase-0 preflight (template TB-4 mirrored)
handover/audits/EXTERNAL_AUDIT_PROMPT_TB_4_SHIP_TB_5_CHARTER_2026-04-30.md:316:- Verify 5-holding CTF: read `monetary_invariant.rs::total_supply_micro` (must sum 5 holdings, not 6 or 4)
handover/audits/CODEX_SPEC_V12_REAUDIT_2026-04-27.md:19:| Q5 STEP_B canonical serialization / ABI / fixtures | Prior Q5 required canonical bytes for tx, `QState`, `SignalBundle`, `TransitionError`, runner ABI, golden fixtures, deterministic fuzz seed, and byte-for-byte success/rejection output comparison. | v1.2 adds §2.5 bincode v2 canonical serialization and a small fixture requirement; full corpus is deferred. | PARTIAL | Prior: `handover/audits/CODEX_SPEC_FREEZE_AUDIT_2026-04-27.md:96-103`, reiterated at `:169-173`. v1.2 defines bincode config at `handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:280-300`, requires one golden tx per tx type at `:302-305`, but explicitly defers full golden fixtures and fuzz seed at `:309`. It still does not specify the full runner ABI or byte outputs for `QState`, `SignalBundle`, and `TransitionError`. Concrete failure mode: one branch can implement the prose bullets (`u32` string length, `u8` enum tag) while another follows the shown `bincode::serde` config; without golden bytes, the spec does not arbitrate. `BTreeMap` order is deterministic, but "lexicographic byte order" is only guaranteed if each key type's `Ord` matches its canonical byte encoding. |
handover/audits/CODEX_SPEC_V12_REAUDIT_2026-04-27.md:30:5. STEP_B serialization is improved but still not mechanically pinned: the prose byte rules, shown bincode config, missing runner ABI, and deferred full fixtures leave room for byte-level divergence (`handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:280-309`).
handover/audits/CODEX_SPEC_V12_REAUDIT_2026-04-27.md:36:v1.2 closes several concrete holes: stake return, named bounty/stake/finalize/window invariants, hidden-input classification, integer royalty rounding, and the main false-challenge default. It does not close the original NO-GO fully. The remaining blocker is not effort level; it is spec ambiguity that two STEP_B branches can still encode differently: legacy economic tx disposition is still missing, STEP_B fixtures/ABI are incomplete, and new lifecycle patches introduce contradictions around task expiry, agent init, challenge-window reuse, and finalize order.
handover/audits/CODEX_SPEC_V12_REAUDIT_2026-04-27.md:49:2. STEP_B is still not byte-pinned: no full runner ABI, no success/rejection output format, no fixtures for `QState` / `SignalBundle` / `TransitionError`, and full golden/fuzz fixtures are explicitly deferred.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_2_PHASE1C_AUDIT_2026-04-30.md:5:Core runtime correctness looks good: the WorkTx arm is pure, the rejection path preserves K1/no-state-advance discipline, the six r2 P0 compile-shape issues are addressed, `cargo check --workspace`, `cargo test --test tb_2_runtime_boundary`, `cargo test --lib state::sequencer`, and `cargo test --workspace` all passed locally. However, I do not clear merge because the diff exceeds the exact preflight surface in public API visibility and misses one literal STEP_B red-line annotation requirement. These are not VETO-class runtime breaks, but they are before-merge scope/constitutional hygiene fixes.
handover/audits/CODEX_PPUT_CCL_AUDIT_ROUND3_2026-04-26.md:122:C_i is NOT restricted to the golden-path payload. Failed-branch tokens MUST be counted. Goal: a system that wastes 1M tokens to find a 1k-token proof has lower PPUT than one that finds the same proof in 100k tokens.

handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:8946:./handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R6.md:8332:handover/ai-direct/STEP_B_PROTOCOL.md:17:**Gate**: if both auditors say "less-invasive alternative exists", take that path instead. If both say "change is necessary", proceed to Phase 1. If they disagree, take the conservative verdict per `feedback_dual_audit_conflict`.
handover/audits/CODEX_PHASE_A8_EXIT_AUDIT_2026-04-26_R10.md:9867:./handover/ai-direct/STEP_B_PROTOCOL.md:17:**Gate**: if both auditors say "less-invasive alternative exists", take that path instead. handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:1:# Gemini TB-13 Ship Audit — CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx (Class 3)
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:15:**SUBJECT**: Class 3 Architectural Strategic Review — CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:24:**1. Does CompleteSetMint create or destroy money?**
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:26:**Finding**: No. The `CompleteSetMintTx` accept arm in `src/state/sequencer.rs:1805-1839` performs a balanced transfer. It debits `balances_t[owner]` and credits `conditional_collateral_t[event_id]` by the same `amount`. The `assert_total_ctf_conserved` invariant, extended in TB-13 to include `conditional_collateral_t` as a coin holding (`src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:186-189`), correctly verifies that this is a migration of funds, not a mint or burn. The integration test `sg_13_1_mint_one_coin_yields_one_yes_plus_one_no_total_coin_conserved` (`tests/tb_13_complete_set.rs:88`) explicitly confirms this.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:30:**Finding**: No. The `CompleteSetRedeemTx` accept arm in `src/state/sequencer.rs:1840-1923` gates execution on the `task_markets_t` state. The `match` statement on `market_state` (`src/state/sequencer.rs:1852`) explicitly returns `Err(TransitionError::RedeemBeforeResolution)` for `TaskMarketState::Open` and `TaskMarketState::Expired`. Redemption is only possible for `Finalized` or `Bankrupt` states. This is confirmed by the integration test `sg_13_5_redeem_unavailable_before_outcome_resolution` (`tests/tb_13_complete_set.rs:170`).
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:34:**Finding**: No. The `CompleteSetRedeemTx` accept arm in `src/state/sequencer.rs:1852-1866` contains a nested `match` that strictly enforces consistency between the on-chain `market_state` and the transaction's `redeem.outcome`. A `TaskMarketState::Bankrupt` (NO outcome) paired with an `outcome=Yes` redeem attempt will fall through to the `(_, _)` arm and be rejected with `Err(TransitionError::InvalidResolutionRef)`. The integration test `sg_13_6_redeem_after_yes_outcome_pays_yes_not_no` (`tests/tb_13_complete_set.rs:199`) includes symmetric checks for this mismatch.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:36:**4. Does the 6-holding `total_supply_micro` sum hold across all TB-13 typed_tx?**
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:38:**Finding**: Yes. The `total_supply_micro` function in `src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:158-192` was extended to include `conditional_collateral_t` as the 6th coin holding (alongside `balances_t`, `escrows_t`, `stakes_t`, `challenge_cases_t`, and the now-removed `claims_t` which was an intent registry). All three new typed-tx variants (`CompleteSetMintTx`, `CompleteSetRedeemTx`, `MarketSeedTx`) are balanced transfers between these holdings (`balances_t` ↔ `conditional_collateral_t`). The `assert_total_ctf_conserved` invariant is called after each transition in the integration tests (e.g., `tests/tb_13_complete_set.rs:125`), confirming the sum holds.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:40:**5. Does `assert_complete_set_balanced` (MIN-semantics: `min(Σ_yes, Σ_no) == collateral`) hold after every transition?**
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:42:**Finding**: Yes. The `assert_complete_set_balanced` function in `src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:278-323` correctly implements the MIN-semantics invariant. This form is robust to post-resolution redemptions where the losing side's shares become stranded (and thus `Σ_losing > collateral`). The integration tests (`sg_13_1...`, `halt_total_supply_micro_unchanged_across_mint_redeem`, `halt_complete_set_balanced_post_seed`) confirm this invariant holds after mint, seed, and redeem transitions.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:44:**6. Can MarketSeedTx create liquidity without provider balance?**
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:46:**Finding**: No. The `MarketSeedTx` accept arm in `src/state/sequencer.rs:1924-1961` has two gates. First, it rejects zero or negative collateral with `InsufficientCollateral` (`src/state/sequencer.rs:1933`). Second, it verifies `provider_bal >= seed.collateral_amount` and rejects with `InsufficientBalanceForMint` if the check fails (`src/state/sequencer.rs:1941`). This is confirmed by tests `sg_13_3_market_seed_fails_if_provider_lacks_balance` and `sg_13_4_market_seed_cannot_create_liquidity_without_collateral`.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:50:**Finding**: No. Per architect CR-13.3 + SG-13.2, shares are claims, not Coin. The implementation in `src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:189-192` explicitly omits `conditional_share_balances_t` from the `total_supply_micro` sum. The integration test `sg_13_2_yes_no_shares_not_in_total_coin_supply` (`tests/tb_13_complete_set.rs:133`) is designed to fail if this were violated.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:54:**Finding**: No. The `ShareAmount` struct in `src/state/typed_tx.rs:1003` uses `units: u128`, which is non-negative by definition. The `CompleteSetRedeemTx` accept arm in `src/state/sequencer.rs:1879` performs a pre-subtraction check: `if owned_units < redeem.share_amount.units { return Err(TransitionError::RedeemMoreThanOwned); }`. This gate prevents any subtraction that could lead to an underflow. This is confirmed by `halt_redeem_more_than_owned_rejected` (`tests/tb_13_complete_set.rs:327`).
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:64:**10. Does CompleteSet schema extend cleanly to TB-14 PriceIndex?**
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:72:**12. Is the `ResolutionRef` model robust to multi-resolver scenarios in TB-15+?**
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:74:**Finding**: Yes. The `ResolutionRef` struct (`src/state/typed_tx.rs:1019`) points to a `resolution_tx_id`. The sequencer logic (`src/state/sequencer.rs:1852`) currently hardcodes the accepted resolution transaction types (`TaskBankruptcyTx`, `FinalizeRewardTx`). To support a new resolver (e.g., a ChallengeCourt emitting a `CourtRulingTx`), the `match` statement can be extended. The model of referencing an on-chain, system-emitted fact is fundamentally robust and extensible.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:76:**13. Is the MIN-semantics `assert_complete_set_balanced` invariant the right form, particularly for adversarial patterns?**
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:79:- **Trace**: An agent can call `CompleteSetMintTx` for an `event_id` whose corresponding `task_markets_t` entry is already in state `Finalized` or `Bankrupt`.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:80:- **Code**: The `CompleteSetMintTx` accept arm (`src/state/sequencer.rs:1805-1839`) does not check the `task_markets_t` state for the given `event_id`.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:82:- **Recommendation**: The `CompleteSetMintTx` and `MarketSeedTx` dispatch arms should be gated to reject transactions targeting an `event_id` that is no longer in the `Open` state.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:92:The core economic invariants (Q1-Q9) are soundly implemented and rigorously tested. The architecture is robust and forward-compatible for its intended purpose (Q10-Q12). However, the lack of a state check in the `CompleteSetMintTx` and `MarketSeedTx` dispatch arms (Q13) represents a minor but tangible architectural smell that should be rectified before shipping. It does not violate a halting trigger but fails the principle of least surprise and could complicate future layers that build on this substrate. The fix is localized and low-risk.
handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2_PRE_R3.md:94:**Action Item**: Add a state check in the `CompleteSetMintTx` and `MarketSeedTx` dispatch arms in `src/state/sequencer.rs` to reject transactions if `task_markets_t[event_id.0].state != TaskMarketState::Open`. After this fix is implemented and verified by a new integration test, the ship can proceed.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_5_PHASE0_R3_AUDIT_2026-04-30.md:32:The monetary cascade amendment itself is correct and minimal. Preflight §2 permits only `TypedTx::ChallengeResolve(_) => Ok(())` in `assert_no_post_init_mint` plus the fixture update, while explicitly keeping the 5-holding count and `total_supply_micro` unchanged (`handover/ai-direct/TB-5_RSP3_RESOLUTION_GATE_2026-04-30.md:74-80`). Preflight §6.3 repeats the exact exhaustive-match arm and fixture requirement (`handover/ai-direct/TB-5_RSP3_RESOLUTION_GATE_2026-04-30.md:712-740`), matching the current source locations: `assert_no_post_init_mint` is at `src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:209-227`, and the fixture table is at `src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:342-360`.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_5_PHASE0_R3_AUDIT_2026-04-30.md:34:The 5-holding CTF invariant remains preserved in the unchanged source: `total_supply_micro` documents and counts balances, escrows, stakes, claims, and `challenge_cases_t.bond` only (`src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:95-103`, `src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:118-137`). The 9-sub-field `EconomicState` shape also remains unchanged in current source (`src/state/q_state.rs:151-166`) and is explicitly preserved by the preflight amendment (`handover/ai-direct/TB-5_RSP3_RESOLUTION_GATE_2026-04-30.md:708-710`) and charter §4.4 (`handover/tracer_bullets/TB-5_charter_2026-04-30.md:126-134`).

handover/audits/run_gemini_spec_freeze_audit.py:31:Q1. **Spec completeness for ship gate**: is v1.1 truly ready as the BINDING contract for STEP_B branch A vs branch B comparison? Any concerns vs your prior CHALLENGE?
handover/audits/run_gemini_spec_freeze_audit.py:59:Q8. **STEP_B feasibility prediction**: bus.rs + kernel.rs are ~870 LOC of intertwined state. Spec v1.1 + STEP_B parallel branches would have Claude-A and Codex-B both generating ~800-1000 LOC each. Realistic prediction: how many spec ambiguities will surface during STEP_B? What's the audit cost of resolving them?
handover/audits/GEMINI_SPEC_V14_ROUND4_AUDIT_2026-04-27.md:24:    *   **Verification**: Spec § 2.5 makes a critical distinction: the **serialization RULE is frozen** in v1.4 (bincode v2, big-endian, etc.), while the full test fixture **corpus is deferred**. This is an acceptable and well-managed scoping decision. It is not an unresolved ambiguity. It provides STEP_B implementers with a concrete, machine-checkable rule for producing byte-identical digests, which is the necessary condition for cross-branch signature compatibility. The deferral of the full test corpus is a downstream implementation task, not a spec-level blocker.
handover/audits/GEMINI_SPEC_V14_ROUND4_AUDIT_2026-04-27.md:42:The specification is implementable, and all blocking issues from prior audit rounds have been resolved. The v1.4 spec provides typed schemas, deterministic pseudocode, a frozen serialization rule, and a comprehensive set of named invariants. This forms a sufficient and binding contract for the two STEP_B implementation branches (A/B) to begin work on atoms CO1.1.4 and CO1.1.5.
handover/audits/GEMINI_SPEC_V14_ROUND4_AUDIT_2026-04-27.md:44:## Q5 STEP_B deferral risk
handover/audits/GEMINI_SPEC_V14_ROUND4_AUDIT_2026-04-27.md:49:*   **Role of Fixtures**: The full fixture corpus is for *conformance testing* (i.e., ensuring an implementation correctly handles a wide range of edge cases), not for *defining the canonical format*. The spec itself defines the format. Therefore, the fixtures are not load-bearing for the STEP_B comparison metric of "do both branches produce compatible, signed objects?". The spec alone is sufficient for that.
handover/audits/GEMINI_SPEC_V14_ROUND4_AUDIT_2026-04-27.md:53:The STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC v1.4 has successfully closed all outstanding issues. The process of iterative audit and patching has produced a rigorous, deterministic, and implementable specification. The remaining deferrals are explicitly acknowledged and appropriately scoped as downstream implementation tasks, not spec-level ambiguities. The document is certified ready for the CO P1 STEP_B launch.
handover/audits/GEMINI_SPEC_V14_ROUND4_AUDIT_2026-04-27.md:57:None. The immediate priority for the implementation teams should be the creation of the initial shared fixture(s) and the conformance test harness, as specified in the deferral acknowledgment (§ 2.5), to enable the mechanical comparison of the STEP_B branches as early as possible. This is now an implementation dependency, not a spec-level concern.

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_2_PHASE0_AUDIT_2026-04-30.md:7:**Q1 [PASS-with-caveat].** The literal restricted set is exactly `src/{kernel,bus}.rs` plus `src/sdk/tools/wallet.rs` in `CLAUDE.md` and `src/kernel.rs`, `src/bus.rs`, `src/sdk/tools/wallet.rs` in STEP_B (`CLAUDE.md:14`, `handover/ai-direct/STEP_B_PROTOCOL.md:3`). `src/state/sequencer.rs` is not on that literal path list. STEP_B itself adds the institutional trigger: "Also applicable to any proposal that touches \"institution\" per C-031" (`handover/ai-direct/STEP_B_PROTOCOL.md:3`). C-031 does not explicitly mention STEP_B or path expansion; its relevant authority is institutional priority: "先确认制度 (规则/约束/结构) 正确，再调参数" and "`Build right, then tune`" (`cases/C-031_institution_over_tuning.yaml:16`, `cases/C-031_institution_over_tuning.yaml:18`). Verdict: the preflight applicability argument is correct through STEP_B line 3, but C-031 alone is only policy support, not an explicit path-rule authorization.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_2_PHASE0_AUDIT_2026-04-30.md:35:1. **Clarify STEP_B institutional authority wording.** STEP_B line 3 is sufficient, but C-031 itself is not an explicit STEP_B path rule (`handover/ai-direct/STEP_B_PROTOCOL.md:3`, `cases/C-031_institution_over_tuning.yaml:16`, `cases/C-031_institution_over_tuning.yaml:18`). Estimated effort: 10 minutes.

handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:438:**STEP_B_PROTOCOL files touched in S1**: `src/ledger.rs` (destructive rename), `src/bus.rs` (S1.6 head method add), `src/kernel.rs` (S1.6 head method add). All require parallel branch + per-atom dual-audit.
handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:460:**STEP_B_PROTOCOL files touched in S2**: `src/wal.rs` (S2.3), `src/ledger.rs` (S2.1, S2.2). Per-atom dual-audit on these two atoms specifically.
handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:466:**This is the heart of the migration. Highest risk sprint. STEP_B_PROTOCOL on every atom.**
handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:485:**STEP_B_PROTOCOL files**: every atom in S3 touches `src/bus.rs` or `src/kernel.rs` or `src/wal.rs` — every commit is parallel-branch + per-atom dual-audit.
handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:501:**STEP_B_PROTOCOL files**: every S4 atom touches `src/bus.rs`, `src/kernel.rs`, or `src/sdk/tools/wallet.rs` (a wallet-restricted file per Codex audit § 5 step 4).
handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:563:- **STEP_B_PROTOCOL atoms** (those touching `src/{bus,kernel,wal,ledger}.rs`): external dual-audit per-atom mandatory.
handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:566:Math: ~50 atoms across the arc. STEP_B atoms = ~25. Per-atom external audits = ~25; per-sprint exit audits = 7. Total external audit invocations ≈ 32, at ~30min each = 16 wall-hours of audit-runtime, plus fix-cycle latency. Budget envelope per audit-cycle is ~$8–15 USD at our backbone pricing → ~$300–500 total external audit spend across TFR. Within PREREG § 11 USD-500 cap, but tight — this is one of the open questions in § 10.
handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:647:| **R3** | dual-audit cycles each take longer than 30min (Codex + Gemini) and budget overrun | Med | Med | per-sprint audit not per-atom (except STEP_B). Conservative atom batching. Budget tracking via `handover/audits/USD_BUDGET_TFR_2026-04-26.md` updated weekly | weekly USD spend check |
handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:716:| D9 | STEP_B_PROTOCOL on every atom touching `src/{bus,kernel,wal,ledger}.rs` | per CLAUDE.md, mandatory |
handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:717:| D10 | Per-sprint dual-audit + per-STEP_B-atom dual-audit | per CLAUDE.md, mandatory |

handover/architect-insights/TFR_MASTER_PLAN_2026-04-26.md:784:| **U1** Node.completion_tokens 字段 mandatory + bus.append* 签名扩展 | **S2.1** (Node v2 with `cost: NodeCost`) + **S3.2** (`append_v2`) | Path B replaces flat `completion_tokens: u32` with structured `NodeCost { prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, tool_stdout_tokens, latency_ms }`; signature change mandated under STEP_B. U2 closed by U1 in Path B. |
handover/architect-insights/THESIS_V2_GROUND_TRUTH_AUDIT_2026-04-25.md:69:**Action**: Phase D ArchitectAI design must specify which surface(s) it reads. Recommend: jsonl as primary ground-truth source, WAL as structural cross-reference, stderr as fallback for fine-grained diagnostics. OR (more invasive): emit OmegaInvoke/Accepted/Rejected/Error to ledger from `oracle.verify_omega_detailed` call sites (touches evaluator.rs but not bus.rs/kernel.rs — outside STEP_B_PROTOCOL restricted-file zone).
handover/architect-insights/ROADMAP_9_PHASE_2026-04-29.md:7:**Amended 2026-05-01 (post-TB-5 chaintape gap)**: per architect ruling 2026-05-01 (`handover/directives/2026-05-01_TB6_ARCHITECT_RULING.md`), **TB-6 = P2 Agent Runtime / Production ChainTape Wire-up takes priority over RSP-3.2 Slash**. Closing the 5-TB ChainTape production debt (TB-1..TB-5 each shipped kernel functionality fully tested in `cargo test --workspace` but NEVER exercised by an LLM-driven binary) is now sequenced before further P3 economic surface. RSP-3.2 Slash is deferred to TB-9. RSP-M NodeMarket / Polymarket track (NodePosition / NodeMarketEntry / PriceIndex / CompleteSet / MarketOrder) is RESERVED-FUTURE inserted between TB-6 and TB-12 (see § 13). Constitution.md is NOT amended (D7 — this is a roadmap / testing-platform gap, not a constitutional gap; constitution already mandates Anti-Oreo + Information-is-Free + 1-Coin-=-1-YES-+-1-NO + on_init-sole-mint). Smoke evidence naming: pre-TB-6 `handover/evidence/tb_{1..5}_smoke_*` retain content but are corrected to **smoke evidence**; "tape" / "ChainTape smoke" reserved for evidence with on-disk ledger chain produced by production binary (D5). `cargo test --workspace` is canonical for ship-gate test count; bare `cargo test` is forbidden in TB-6+ ship reporting (D4). Audit mode is hybrid by risk class: production wire-up = Codex impl + Gemini arch with explicit `degraded` label if Gemini exhausted (D3).
handover/architect-insights/ROADMAP_9_PHASE_2026-04-29.md:9:**Amended 2026-05-02 (post-TB-7R ship + lossless constitution + Polymarket absorption)**: per architect directive 2026-05-02 (`handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive.md`), the post-TB-7R sequence is **re-anchored to v1.0 Lean Proof Task Market launch** rather than continued economic-surface expansion. New TB ordering: **TB-8 Minimal Payout / FinalizeRewardTx (Class 3)** → TB-9 Durable AgentRegistry + Wallet Projection → TB-10 Lean Proof Task Market MVP → TB-11 NodePosition + PriceIndex (no trading) → TB-12 CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx → TB-13 CPMM Router → TB-14 PriceIndex + Boltzmann Masking → TB-15 Lamarckian Autopsy + Markov Log Loom → TB-16 Beta with market signals → v1.0 launch (≥100 tasks replayable, all proofs CAS-resolvable, no ghost liquidity, no agent-submitted system tx). RSP-3.2 Slash moves from TB-9 to **TB-12-equivalent territory** (after payout + identity + evidence-capsule are stable); slash hardens the invariant, payout *is* the invariant. Polymarket / CTF math formally absorbed into RSP-M0..RSP-M5 with **strict no-ghost-liquidity guards** — see four decision records (`handover/alignment/DECISION_POLYMARKET_CORE_2026-05-02.md`, `DECISION_CPMM_MINT_AND_SWAP_2026-05-02.md`, `DECISION_MARKET_SEED_NO_GHOST_LIQUIDITY_2026-05-02.md`, `DECISION_LAMARCKIAN_AUTOPSY_BOLTZMANN_2026-05-02.md`). The literal phrase "每个新节点自动注入 100 YES + 100 NO" is **REJECTED**; rewritten as `MarketSeedTx` debiting `MarketMakerBudget` allocated at `on_init`. Three flowcharts (Flowchart 1 runtime / Flowchart 2 boot / Flowchart 3 meta) gain SHA256-anchored canonical status — see `handover/alignment/TRACE_FLOWCHART_MATRIX.md`. Markov rule formalized: per-session `EvidenceCapsule` becomes default-context source; historical logs preserved but not loaded into ArchitectAI by default (TB-15 deliverable). Constitution.md is NOT amended (ruling 15: sudo-only). Layer 1 invariants (kernel.rs purity / Append-Only DAG / economic conservation) all NOT VIOLATED — Append-Only and conservation explicitly STRENGTHENED by directive.
handover/architect-insights/ROADMAP_9_PHASE_2026-04-29.md:218:- **Cache=truth invariant** (TB-3 charter § 3.2): `task_market.total_escrow == Σ escrows_t[e].amount where e.task_id == task_id` enforced by `assert_task_market_total_escrow_matches_locks` at every accepted EscrowLock + by integration tests I22 + I29 + I30. `monetary_invariant.total_supply_micro` does NOT count `total_escrow` (else double-mint on every lock).

Also applicable to any proposal that touches 'institution' per C-031."*
handover/ai-direct/TB-2_SEQUENCER_RUNTIME_CLOSURE_2026-04-30.md:19:`src/state/sequencer.rs` qualifies under STEP_B line 3's institutional-touch clause:
handover/ai-direct/TB-2_SEQUENCER_RUNTIME_CLOSURE_2026-04-30.md:25:C-031 (`cases/C-031_institution_over_tuning.yaml:16,18`) provides policy support for the rule "Build right, then tune" / "先确认制度 (规则/约束/结构) 正确，再调参数" but is *not* itself a path-rule authorization — STEP_B line 3's catch-all is the operative trigger. Per Gemini r1 P1-A, `src/state/sequencer.rs` is also being added to CLAUDE.md's literal restricted list in this revision (see §11 hygiene patches) so future LLM agents do not need to re-derive applicability from case law.
handover/ai-direct/TB-2_SEQUENCER_RUNTIME_CLOSURE_2026-04-30.md:27:Treat sequencer.rs edits with full STEP_B rigor. Disagreement → conservative verdict (require) per `feedback_dual_audit_conflict`.
handover/ai-direct/TB-2_SEQUENCER_RUNTIME_CLOSURE_2026-04-30.md:524:TB-2 is a runtime-spine correctness change, not a population-statistics A/B. The pre-registered decision rule is **deterministic 16/16 PASS** across the combined battery (3 in-crate unit + 13 integration tests; see §5.1 / §5.2), not a SolveRate delta. `frozen_analysis.py` is **not invoked** for TB-2 acceptance (no LLM-in-the-loop sample). The STEP_B Phase-2 `--control`/`--treatment` machinery is therefore replaced by:

handover/ai-direct/AUTO_RESEARCH_NOTEPAD.md:277:- **RSP-M NodeMarket / Polymarket track**: RESERVED-FUTURE per ruling § 4. WorkTx.stake = first-long exposure (semantic; not market mechanic until RSP-M1). ChallengeTx.stake = short / NO exposure. VerifyTx.bond = responsibility bond. Price = statistical signal, NOT truth. NodePosition.amount does NOT count toward total_supply_micro. NO automatic liquidity injection. NO ghost liquidity. RSP-M0 decision record path: `handover/alignment/DECISION_NODE_MARKET_FIRST_LONG_2026-05-XX.md` (deferred to post-TB-6; not created in TB-6).

This touches the supply-conservation invariant directly; per `cases/C-001_post_genesis_minting.yaml` it is the highest-criticality enforcement code in the project.

handover/ai-direct/TB-3_RSP1_FORMAL_TX_SURFACE_2026-04-30.md:33:| `src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs` | CTF conservation gate | **YES**. `total_supply_micro` drops the `bounty` term (`:90-94`). 6 → 5 holdings. Adds new public predicate `assert_task_market_total_escrow_matches_locks` per charter § 3.2 cache=truth invariant. TB-1 test `ctf_counts_all_six_holding_subindexes` (`:404-435`) renamed + rewritten to `_five_`. |
handover/ai-direct/TB-3_RSP1_FORMAL_TX_SURFACE_2026-04-30.md:62:3. **`task_markets_t.bounty`** at `src/state/q_state.rs:228-239` is currently treated as a money holding (counted in `monetary_invariant.rs::total_supply_micro:90-94`; named "bounty" in the test at `:405`). Once `EscrowLockTx` lands, the same money is also in `escrows_t.amount` — counting both would mint phantom money on every escrow lock. Even before TB-3 lands, the schema is set up to encourage double-counting: any `EscrowLockTx`-shaped helper that updates `task_markets_t.bounty` AND `escrows_t.amount` simultaneously without dropping the bounty term would trigger this.

handover/ai-direct/TB-3_RSP1_FORMAL_TX_SURFACE_2026-04-30.md:199:**New test**: `total_supply_does_not_double_count_total_escrow` — explicitly constructs an EconomicState with both `escrows_t[e].amount = K` and `task_markets_t[t].total_escrow = K`; asserts `total_supply_micro` returns K (not 2K).
handover/ai-direct/TB-3_RSP1_FORMAL_TX_SURFACE_2026-04-30.md:533:| M3 | `total_supply_does_not_double_count_total_escrow` | NEW; constructs paired `escrows_t.amount=K` + `task_markets_t.total_escrow=K`; asserts `total_supply_micro` = K not 2K |

handover/ai-direct/TB-3_RSP1_FORMAL_TX_SURFACE_2026-04-30.md:620:- **5-holding migration** (charter § 3.2): `monetary_invariant.rs` reduces holding count from 6 to 5. This is independently verifiable: any pre-TB-3 `total_supply_micro` invocation that depended on `task_markets_t.bounty` being nonzero will see a different total. The TB-1 boot test that asserts genesis `total_supply_micro == 0` (`monetary_invariant.rs:355`) is unaffected because genesis has no `task_markets_t` entries.
handover/ai-direct/PAPER_1_v2_DRAFT_SKELETON_2026-04-24.md:197:Node-count distribution per solve (addressing P2-12): to be extracted from gp_payload when Appendix C is finalized; preliminary check shows some B solves terminate in 1 `step` node (multi-line inline proof), others in multi-node chains. The solve-count claim in § 4.1 is robust to this distinction; the "multi-agent collaboration" interpretation is restricted to multi-node chains and is explicitly scoped in § 7 Limitation 5.

handover/ai-direct/TB-6_PRODUCTION_CHAINTAPE_BOOTSTRAP_2026-05-01.md:108:No restricted file modified. STEP_B Phase-1 parallel-branch A/B is NOT triggered. D3 production-wire-up Codex impl audit IS still required (round-1 done; round-2 narrow on the v1→v2 diff is the next gate).
handover/ai-direct/TB-6_PRODUCTION_CHAINTAPE_BOOTSTRAP_2026-05-01.md:157:v2.0's shutdown_tx wiring was dead. v2.1 fix: **don't call `Sequencer::run`. Write a runtime-side driver loop in `src/runtime/mod.rs`** that owns the receiver, calls `Sequencer::apply_one` directly, and uses `tokio::select!` on a shutdown channel. Sequencer.rs untouched (no STEP_B trigger).
handover/ai-direct/TB-6_PRODUCTION_CHAINTAPE_BOOTSTRAP_2026-05-01.md:391:Each Atom 1.N reports `cargo test --workspace` count delta per ruling D4. STEP_B not triggered (no restricted file). 24h iteration cap: production-wire-up exception applies (charter § 7.2; Atom 3 must run within 72h of Atom 0 ship).
handover/ai-direct/TB-6_PRODUCTION_CHAINTAPE_BOOTSTRAP_2026-05-01.md:480:### §8.2 Sequencer::run shutdown semantics (CLOSED v2.1 — runtime-side wrapper, no STEP_B trigger)
handover/ai-direct/TB-6_PRODUCTION_CHAINTAPE_BOOTSTRAP_2026-05-01.md:482:Codex round-2 verified `Sequencer::run` (`src/state/sequencer.rs:1350-1363`) has NO shutdown branch + `Sequencer` owns `queue_tx` (`:1093`) → option (a) "drop queue_tx via Arc count" cannot work because the driver task itself holds `Arc<Sequencer>` keeping the sender alive. Option (b) (modify `Sequencer::run` signature) would trigger STEP_B. **v2.1 picks option (c)**: replace the call to `Sequencer::run` with a runtime-side driver wrapper in `src/runtime/mod.rs` (see §3.2). The wrapper owns the receiver, uses `tokio::select!` on shutdown_rx, and calls `Sequencer::apply_one` (`pub(crate)`; same crate) directly. Sequencer.rs untouched. STEP_B safe. T4 + T10 verify lifecycle correctness.
handover/ai-direct/TB-6_PRODUCTION_CHAINTAPE_BOOTSTRAP_2026-05-01.md:494:Per `feedback_step_b_protocol` recommendation, atom-level isolation via `experiment/tb6-chaintape-bootstrap` worktree gives clean rollback even though STEP_B isn't strictly triggered. Disk now permits worktree creation.

handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:293:> **Required because**: `tx.canonical_digest()` is called in spec § 3 stages 2 of WorkTx / VerifyTx / ChallengeTx, but byte-level format is undefined. STEP_B branch A vs branch B may pick different serialization (JSON sorted keys vs bincode vs Rust derive order) → cross-branch signature verification fails. Mandatory canonical format closes this.
handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:322:**STEP_B implication**: branches A and B both use this exact `bincode_canonical_config`; signature verification works cross-branch by construction.
handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:324:**Out of scope for v1.x spec** (deferred per Codex Q5/NEW-5 round-3 PARTIAL acknowledgment): full golden fixture corpus + differential fuzzing seed + complete runner ABI for QState/SignalBundle/TransitionError. v1.4 freezes the SERIALIZATION RULE (bincode v2 big-endian + BTreeMap lex); fixtures + ABI land in **CO1.1.4-pre1** (canonical fixture corpus) + **CO1.7** (full ABI surface). This is an **explicit deferral** — not unresolved spec ambiguity. STEP_B branch A and branch B both implement the SAME bincode rule; per-tx digest matching is mechanical from v1.4. Full corpus generation is a downstream code task, not spec scope.
handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:714:// PURE transition (used by both branch A and branch B in STEP_B)
handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:895:**Total: 27 invariants → 27 tests** (was 22 in v1.1; +5 in v1.2). Every transition test must pass before CO1.1.4 (bus.rs split) starts. STEP_B implementation comparison is "branch X conforms to spec" / "branch Y conforms to spec", not "branch X looks like branch Y".
handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:948:**Why**: spec § 3 pseudocode is single-threaded; CO P1 may parallelize Phase C 5 modes × N seeds. Without explicit serialization rule, two work_tx can race on same parent_state_root, both pass `I-PARENT`, but produce different (logical_t, tx_id) sequences across STEP_B branches → state_root divergence.
handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:997:**Invariant binding**: `I-CHALLENGE-WINDOW-EDGE` enforces that BOTH transition functions call `is_open(now)` rather than hand-coding the boundary check. STEP_B branch A vs branch B both implement the same `is_open()`; cross-branch comparison verifies identical results for all (opens_at, duration_ticks, now) triples.
handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:1008:This means: STEP_B branch A and branch B may serialize threads differently (depending on OS scheduler), but as long as both branches use atomic logical_t assignment + replay from the SAME logical_t sequence, they produce byte-identical state_roots.
handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:1059:6. STEP_B implementation: Claude implements branch A against spec; Codex implements branch B against spec; comparison metric = "spec conformance", not "code similarity"
handover/specs/STATE_TRANSITION_SPEC_v1_2026-04-27.md:1067:- A binding contract for STEP_B branch A/B comparison

handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:3:**Status**: v1.2.2 (2026-04-29; **PASS/PASS** at round-4 — pre-implementation gate cleared per CLAUDE.md "Audit Standard"; STEP_B Branch B re-derivation performed and ceremony closed at T1 executable-substance byte-identity per amended § 2.2). Codex r4 PASS/High + Gemini r4 PASS/High. Verdict: `CO1_7_EXTRA_DUAL_AUDIT_VERDICT_R4_2026-04-29.md`. v1.2.1 applied 2 non-blocking editorial nits (N1+N2). v1.2.2 (this revision) refines § 2.2 with a tiered byte-identity definition + records Branch B closure in the awaiting list (process-spec refinement; non-mathematical, not requiring re-audit per same precedent as v1.2.1).
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:14:**Single sentence**: close the G-1 carry-forward `q.head_t = NodeId(commit_oid_hex)` after `Git2LedgerWriter.commit`, perform a single-file STEP_B ceremony adding a Sequencer entry-point on TuringBus (Kernel UNTOUCHED), and ship substrate-independent tests — leaving transition function bodies + replay byte-identity to a future CO1.7.5 atom that depends on the Wave-2 substrate (CO P2.x family).
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:44:2. **D3** — Single-file STEP_B ceremony adds `Option<Arc<Sequencer>>` field + `with_sequencer` constructor + `submit_typed_tx` forwarder method to `TuringBus` (note: type is `TuringBus`, not `Bus`, per `src/bus.rs:53`). Sequencer lives in TuringBus directly (not nested through Kernel) per round-2 MF4 — Kernel preserves "pure topology" doctrine and stays UNTOUCHED by this atom.
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:157:## § 2 D3 — Single-file STEP_B ceremony for TuringBus Sequencer entry-point

Also adds the manual `Debug` impl on `Sequencer` in `src/state/sequencer.rs` (NOT STEP_B-restricted; lands alongside for compile coherence).

handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:438:4. **TuringBus owns Sequencer directly** (round-2 MF4) — not nested through Kernel. Kernel preserves "pure topology" doctrine (`src/kernel.rs:5-6`+`:15-17`) and stays UNTOUCHED by this atom. STEP_B becomes single-file ceremony on `src/bus.rs`.
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:503:### v1.2.2 (this revision; STEP_B Branch B closure)
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:505:STEP_B Branch B re-derivation performed in a separate session against `5ce01b1` (Branch A). Empirical finding: spec § 2.1 was precise enough to converge two independent derivers on **byte-identical executable Rust** (imports, struct field, constructor delegate, forwarder match logic) but **NOT** on literal full-file byte-identity — divergences appeared in (a) doc-comment prose paraphrase, (b) `with_sequencer`/`submit_typed_tx` parameter line-wrapping, and (c) `submit_typed_tx` method placement order within `impl TuringBus`. Pure `cargo fmt` normalization on both branches did NOT reduce divergence to zero (it preserves valid pre-existing wrapping + comment text + method ordering).
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:507:**Resolution**: § 2.2 amended in this revision to define a **3-tier byte-identity** (T1 executable substance REQUIRED; T2 formatting & layout MAY drift; T3 doc-comment prose MAY drift). Branch B re-derivation passed T1 unanimously across all 5 substantive surfaces (imports / field / `new()` body / `with_sequencer` body / `submit_typed_tx` match arms). **STEP_B ceremony for `src/bus.rs` is therefore CLOSED**.
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:509:The amendment is itself a process-spec refinement (not a mathematical re-statement) and does not require re-audit per the same precedent as v1.2.1's editorial nits — a tiered byte-identity is strictly less permissive than the prior absent definition (which had no formal closure criterion at all besides "identical → merge"; the prior wording silently relied on STEP_B implementers' unspoken judgement that rustfmt-equivalent drift was acceptable).
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:521:- **MF4** Sequencer placement: TuringBus owns directly (NOT nested through Kernel). Kernel UNTOUCHED. STEP_B becomes single-file ceremony (§ 2.1 + § 2.2).
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:533:- **B3** (Codex Q4): removed stale Kernel references at preface line 14 (single-sentence summary now reads "single-file STEP_B ceremony adding a Sequencer entry-point on TuringBus (Kernel UNTOUCHED)") + § 6 pre-implementation gate (removed `src/kernel.rs` from gate file list; explicitly noted "Kernel UNTOUCHED").
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:541:2. ✅ ~~CO1.7-extra-impl Branch A~~ — landed at `5ce01b1` (D2 advance_head_t helper + apply_one stage 9 patch + required trait method + 2 impl declarations + TuringBus single-file STEP_B Branch A + 3 substrate-independent tests + stale-comment update at sequencer.rs:178-184/:357-361). ~255 LoC actuals; cargo test 239/0/1.
handover/specs/CO1_7_EXTRA_HEAD_T_WIRING_v1_2026-04-29.md:542:3. ✅ ~~STEP_B Branch B re-derivation~~ — performed in separate session 2026-04-29 against `src/bus.rs` only (the single STEP_B-restricted file in this atom; per § 2.2). T1 executable-substance: **byte-identical**. T2/T3 formatting + prose: divergent (informational, see v1.2.2 patch log). § 2.2 amended to formalize tiered byte-identity. **STEP_B ceremony CLOSED**.

handover/alignment/DECISION_POLYMARKET_CORE_2026-05-02.md:93:1. CompleteSetMintTx invariant:
handover/alignment/DECISION_POLYMARKET_CORE_2026-05-02.md:94:     before:  balances_t[agent] = X, conditional_collateral_t[event] = C
handover/alignment/DECISION_POLYMARKET_CORE_2026-05-02.md:95:     after:   balances_t[agent] = X - n, conditional_collateral_t[event] = C + n
handover/alignment/DECISION_POLYMARKET_CORE_2026-05-02.md:99:2. CompleteSetMergeTx invariant: inverse of mint.
handover/alignment/DECISION_POLYMARKET_CORE_2026-05-02.md:101:3. CompleteSetRedeemTx invariant:
handover/alignment/DECISION_POLYMARKET_CORE_2026-05-02.md:104:     conditional_collateral_t[event] -= redeemed_amount
handover/alignment/DECISION_POLYMARKET_CORE_2026-05-02.md:107:4. No agent can submit CompleteSet system tx — agent submits Mint/Merge,
handover/alignment/DECISION_POLYMARKET_CORE_2026-05-02.md:110:5. ShareBalances NOT included in monetary_invariant::total_supply_micro.

handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:934:> **"每个新节点系统自动注入 YES/NO 各 100"不能按字面进入宪法或实现。它只能改写为"由 on_init 预先拨款的做市预算 / LP escrow 显式出资 / treasury debit 支持的 MarketSeedTx"。**
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:937:同时，我不会把"不要悬赏金，因为系统做市商可以 0 亏损"吸收到核心方案。这个判断过于乐观。做市商即便使用 CPMM，也会面临 informed trader 的逆向选择风险；除非改成动态 pari-mutuel / pro-rata 体系，但那又不是标准 Polymarket/CompleteSet 模型，会改变价格含义。所以我的裁决是：
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1083:CompleteSetMintTx:
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1085:  conditional_collateral_t[event] += payC
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1090:YES/NO shares 不是 Coin 供应量；`conditional_collateral_t` 才是 holding。
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1131:MarketSeedTx:
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1134:  CompleteSetMintTx(seedC)
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1150:  每个新 node 自动尝试 MarketSeedTx(100)，前提是 MarketMakerBudget 余额足够。
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1214:这其实已经从 Polymarket/CompleteSet 模型切换到了：
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1226:不要和 CompleteSet/CPMM 混合。
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1232:CompleteSet:
handover/directives/2026-05-02_lossless_constitution_polymarket_directive__part_C_updated_final_ruling.md:1645:## TB-12：CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx

handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:1:# TB-13 Charter — CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx (Conditional-Share Substrate)
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:7:**Phase**: **P3 carry-forward** (RSP-M Polymarket collateral substrate per 2026-05-02 directive Part C §9.4) + **P4 primary** (CompleteSet is the conditional-share substrate that TB-15 MarkovEvidenceCapsule will compress into Information Loom rollups; first canonical YES_E + NO_E claim accounting).
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:8:**Risk class envelope**: **Class 3** (per architect §4.8). Per-atom: Atom 0.5 = Class 1 (forward-fence + label, no production deletion). Atom 1 = Class 2 (additive schema). Atom 2 = **Class 3** (sequencer money path — debits `balances_t`, credits new `conditional_collateral_t`, issues `conditional_share_balances_t`). Atom 3 = Class 3 (extends `monetary_invariant`; touches CTF). Atom 4 = Class 1 (dashboard read-only). Atom 5 = Class 1 (tests). Ship audit (Atom 6) = **Class 3 dual** (Codex + Gemini, no honest-deferral; conservative-verdict-wins).
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:14:  - **CP-B** after Atom 2 (sequencer dispatch; STEP_B-protocol; conservation pre-check via assert_total_ctf_conserved).
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:19:**FC-trace**: `Art. 0.2` (Tape Canonical — `CompleteSetMintTx` / `CompleteSetRedeemTx` / `MarketSeedTx` canonical-encoded; replay-deterministic) + `Art. I.1` (5-step compile loop — conditional collateral and share accounting are part of the proposal-pricing substrate, but DO NOT affect predicate outcome; CR-13.6 explicit) + `Art. III.4` (no fake accepted preserved — Redeem requires system-resolved outcome reference; agent-callable Redeem rejected pre-resolution) + `Art. V.1.3` (Anti-Oreo — `MarketSeedTx` requires explicit provider funds, NO automatic seed; `CompleteSetMintTx` is agent-driven balance debit, no money created) + `WP-§14.1` (typed_tx variant additive bumps; 3 NEW typed-tx variants; CompleteSetRedeem additionally accepts a `ResolutionRef` from system-emitted resolution; not a unilateral agent variant since pre-resolution rejection is sequencer-side gate) + `WP-§19` (RSP-M collateral substrate — conditional collateral is the YES_E + NO_E claim foundation that TB-14 PriceIndex will derive prices from).
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:21:**Flowchart-trace**: **Flowchart 1** (runtime — `CompleteSetMintTx` debits `balances_t`, credits `conditional_collateral_t`, increments equal `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event, Yes/No)]`; `CompleteSetRedeemTx` requires system-resolution-reference, debits `conditional_share_balances_t`, credits `balances_t`; `MarketSeedTx` debits `balances_t` of provider, credits `conditional_collateral_t` + records protocol-owned share inventory) + **Flowchart 2** (boot — runtime preseed unchanged; EconomicState 11→13 sub-fields with backward-compat `#[serde(default)]` empty maps) + **Flowchart 3** (meta — conditional shares are TB-14 PriceIndex price-derivation substrate + TB-15 MarkovEvidenceCapsule compression input; TB-13 lays bytes only; no price, no AMM, no orderbook).

handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:169:  - `ResolutionRef` newtype referencing the system-emitted resolution (TB-13 reuses `TaskBankruptcyTx.tx_id` for NO outcome + reuses `FinalizeRewardTx.tx_id` for YES outcome — both already system-emitted; this is the "system resolution reference" architect §4.3 mentions).
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:170:  - `CompleteSetMintTx { tx_id, parent_state_root, event_id, owner, amount: MicroCoin, signature }` agent-callable.

handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:172:  - `MarketSeedTx { tx_id, parent_state_root, event_id, provider, collateral_amount: MicroCoin, signature }` agent-callable; provider == seed_owner.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:174:  - Round-trip + deterministic-digest unit tests; STEP_B_PROTOCOL parallel-branch since touches `src/state/typed_tx.rs` restricted file.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:177:  - `EconomicState` 11 → 13 sub-fields with `+conditional_collateral_t: ConditionalCollateralIndex` + `+conditional_share_balances_t: ConditionalShareBalances`. Both `#[serde(default)]` for backward-compat with TB-12 chain snapshots.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:181:    - `CompleteSetMintTx`: validate balance >= amount; debit `balances_t[owner]` by amount; credit `conditional_collateral_t[event_id]` by amount; credit equal share_amount=amount.units to `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event, Yes)]` AND `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event, No)]`. (Architect FR-13.1 + FR-13.2 + FR-13.3.)
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:182:    - `CompleteSetRedeemTx`: validate `resolution_ref` resolves to either a `TaskBankruptcyTx` (NO outcome) or a `FinalizeRewardTx` (YES outcome) for `event_id`; verify outcome matches Tx outcome field; debit `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event, outcome)]` by share_amount; credit `balances_t[owner]` by share_amount.units (1:1 per architect FR-13.5: "after YES outcome pays YES shares"); debit `conditional_collateral_t[event_id]` by share_amount.units. Pre-resolution rejected (architect FR-13.4 + SG-13.5).
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:183:    - `MarketSeedTx`: validate `balances_t[provider] >= collateral_amount`; debit `balances_t[provider]`; credit `conditional_collateral_t[event_id]` by collateral_amount; credit `conditional_share_balances_t[(provider, event, Yes)]` AND `(provider, event, No)` each by collateral_amount.units (provider owns BOTH sides; explicit provider-funded; NO trading; architect FR-13.6 + FR-13.7).
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:185:  - 3 new `TransitionError` variants (additive): `InsufficientBalanceForMint`, `RedeemBeforeResolution`, `InsufficientCollateral`.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:186:  - STEP_B_PROTOCOL parallel-branch since touches `src/state/sequencer.rs` restricted file.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:189:  - Extend `assert_total_ctf_conserved` to add `conditional_collateral_t` as the 6th Coin holding (architect CR-13.4: "Locked collateral is Coin holding"); EXCLUDE `conditional_share_balances_t` from the sum (architect CR-13.3 + SG-13.2: "shares are not Coin").
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-13_charter_2026-05-03.md:190:  - New invariant `assert_complete_set_balanced`: for every event_id, `Σ conditional_share_balances_t[(*, event, Yes)] == Σ conditional_share_balances_t[(*, event, No)] == conditional_collateral_t[event].units` (1 Coin = 1 YES + 1 NO mathematical identity post-mint and post-redeem).

Match arms re-assert via assertion that no balance increased net of debit+credit.

handover/tracer_bullets/TB-9_charter_2026-05-02.md:74:The conservation invariant `Σ balances_t + Σ escrows_t = total_supply_micro` is preserved exactly across the WalletTool collapse — Goal B is a **deletion of a parallel ledger that was never load-bearing on the chain path**, not a migration of state. There is no f64 ↔ MicroCoin transfer step.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-9_charter_2026-05-02.md:134:**STEP_B preflight required** (per `feedback_step_b_protocol`): `agent_keypairs.rs` is in scope of restricted-file changes (it is the auth primitive for the entire production path). Parallel-branch A/B with side-by-side test on the existing TB-7 fail-closed semantics. Preflight artifact: `handover/audits/STEP_B_PREFLIGHT_TB9_ATOM1_2026-05-XX.md`.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-9_charter_2026-05-02.md:200:**STEP_B preflight required** (sequencer.rs + typed_tx.rs are restricted-files). Parallel-branch A/B; preflight artifact: `handover/audits/STEP_B_PREFLIGHT_TB9_ATOM2_2026-05-XX.md`.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-9_charter_2026-05-02.md:267:**Conservation witness test**: `U-A4.a` — synthetic genesis → 100 dummy WorkTx (with stake debits from balances_t) → run pre-TB-9 vs. post-TB-9 conservation invariant; both must equal `genesis_total_supply_micro` exactly. This proves the WalletTool collapse is a deletion-not-migration.

handover/tracer_bullets/TB-3_charter_2026-04-30.md:4:**Status**: DRAFT v2 (incorporates WP-canonical reconciliation per user verdict 2026-04-30; STEP_B Phase-0 NOT yet launched; no production code touched.)
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-3_charter_2026-04-30.md:67:- `monetary_invariant::total_supply_micro()` MUST count `Σ escrows_t[e].amount` and MUST NOT count `Σ task_markets_t[t].total_escrow`. Counting both would double-count every locked bounty by exactly its amount and effectively mint that amount each time `EscrowLockTx` runs.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-3_charter_2026-04-30.md:68:- TB-1's `total_supply_micro` summed **six** holding subindexes (balances + escrows + stakes + claims + **bounty** + bond, see `src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:90-94, :404-435`). TB-3 reduces this to **five** holdings (drop the `bounty` term entirely; bounty money has migrated to `escrows_t`).

handover/tracer_bullets/TB-6_charter_2026-05-01.md:85:### 4.6 No "RSP-M" / NodeMarket / Polymarket / CompleteSet work in TB-6
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-6_charter_2026-05-01.md:87:Per architect ruling § 4. The full RSP-M NodeMarket track (NodePosition, NodeMarketEntry, PriceIndex, CompleteSet, MarketOrder) is reserved-future post-TB-6 and is explicitly forbidden from this TB. WorkTx.stake stays a kernel admission gate, not a market position; ChallengeTx.stake stays a kernel challenge bond, not a Short/NO position; VerifyTx.bond stays a responsibility bond, not a market position. The future-form first-long economic interpretation is documented in the architect ruling but does NOT enter the codebase in TB-6.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-6_charter_2026-05-01.md:89:### 4.7 STEP_B_PROTOCOL applies to bus.rs / main.rs touches
handover/tracer_bullets/TB-6_charter_2026-05-01.md:91:`src/bus.rs` and `src/state/sequencer.rs` are STEP_B-protected per CLAUDE.md + TB-2 P1-A. Any TB-6 atom that wires `Sequencer` into `TuringBus` or initializes a production `Git2LedgerWriter` from `main.rs` MUST use the parallel-branch A/B protocol per `STEP_B_PROTOCOL.md` and `feedback_step_b_protocol`. The evaluator binary `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs` is NOT STEP_B-protected (sub-crate experiment binary), but its imports of `turingosv4::state::*` cross the kernel boundary and warrant a smaller-scale phased commit.

handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:10:# 2026-04-30 TB-2 charter (active) — "P1/P3 Runtime Boundary Closure + RSP-1". Goal: real WorkTx traverses Sequencer::dispatch_transition; accepted → canonical L4 (transition_ledger + LedgerWriter, NOT economy::ledger::AcceptedLedger which stays a TB-1 primitive); rejected → L4.E with submit_id; RSP-1 admission via WorkTx.stake>0 + seeded EconomicState escrow. STEP_B-protected target: src/state/sequencer.rs. Forbidden Day-1: ledger I/O inside dispatch_transition; new TypedTx variants; non-empty exempt_tx_kinds at runtime; P5/P6/h_vppu work; AcceptedLedger as production accepted spine. Charter: handover/tracer_bullets/TB-2_charter_2026-04-30.md. STEP_B preflight: handover/ai-direct/TB-2_SEQUENCER_RUNTIME_CLOSURE_2026-04-30.md.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:12:# 2026-04-30 TB-3 charter v2 + STEP_B Phase-0 preflight v1 — "P3 RSP-1 Formal Tx Surface (WP-canonical)". Goal: 2 new TypedTx variants (TaskOpenTx + EscrowLockTx) on canonical L4; bridge at sequencer.rs:197-215 deleted; WorkTx admission becomes structural (task_markets_t[task_id].total_escrow > 0 + balances_t[agent] >= work.stake); accepted WorkTx commits stake (balances_t debit + stakes_t insert per WP § 14.1 + § 18 Inv 5 lock-on-accept); rejected WorkTx leaves economic_state_t bit-identical (L4.E never mutates economic state per user verdict #14). Charter: handover/tracer_bullets/TB-3_charter_2026-04-30.md. Preflight: handover/ai-direct/TB-3_RSP1_FORMAL_TX_SURFACE_2026-04-30.md.
handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:13:# 2026-04-30 TB-5 SHIPPED — merged at 1bdc55a (--no-ff merge of experiment/tb5-rsp3-resolution-gate into main). Eight atoms (4c3414e Atom 1 STEP_B preflight → 66f559e Atom 1.5 round-2 remediation → b9de549 Atom 1.6 round-3 doc-fix → c415cd2 round-4 self-verification fallback → 42fd45c Atom 2 substrate ingress → 4a33b1a Atom 3 ABI → 9ff8179 Atom 4 emit_system_tx + apply_one stage 1.5 → 06a7fcf Atom 5 ChallengeResolve dispatch arm → c7dfef9 Atom 6 UpheldDeferred + boundary tests → cc72d61 Atom 7 replay + property + anti-drift CI → 2fb4ed9 Atom 8 recursive audit + 真题烟测). **617/617 cargo test --workspace passing** (corrected 2026-05-01 per `handover/audits/SELF_AUDIT_TB_5_SMOKE_TAPE_2026-05-01.md` § 2 — original ship-time figure of 464 was bare `cargo test` count without --workspace; net delta from TB-4 baseline 571 = 46 new TB-5 tests). Production claim adds: "TuringOS runtime kernel structurally enforces Anti-Oreo agent-vs-system ingress separation. Agent ingress (submit_agent_tx) rejects 4 system-emitted variants pre-queue with SubmitError::SystemTxForbiddenOnAgentIngress. System ingress (emit_system_tx) constructs + signs system-emitted TypedTx structs INTERNALLY with the runtime's Ed25519Keypair; defense-in-depth verification at apply_one stage 1.5 re-checks signatures against PinnedSystemPubkeys. ChallengeResolve dispatch arm enforces idempotent single-shot resolution: Released refunds challenger bond (entry preserved); UpheldDeferred is marker-only with bond preserved for TB-6 RSP-3.2 slash routing. CTF conserved across mixed Released + UpheldDeferred sequences; 9-sub-field EconomicState invariant + 5-holding CTF preserved." Audit trail: STEP_B Phase-0 r1+r2+r3 (Codex round-2 4 CHALLENGE → 1.5 amendments; round-3 2 CHALLENGE → 1.6 doc-fix; round-4 Codex agent infra failure → self-verification fallback). Codex-only audit mode per `2026-04-30_TB5_audit_mode_supplement.md` (Gemini strategic-tier MODEL_CAPACITY_EXHAUSTED).
handover/tracer_bullets/TB_LOG.tsv:14:# 2026-05-01 TB-6 ACTIVE — "P2 Agent Runtime: Production ChainTape Wire-up". Architect ruling 2026-05-01 (`handover/directives/2026-05-01_TB6_ARCHITECT_RULING.md`) selected Path A (P2 Agent Runtime / Production ChainTape Wire-up) over Path B (RSP-3.2 Slash) per D1. 7 binding decisions ruled: D1 Path A; D2 chain-backed smoke = HARD requirement from TB-6; D3 hybrid-by-risk audit (TB-6 = production wire-up class → Codex impl + Gemini arch with degraded fallback); D4 `cargo test --workspace` canonical with mandated reporting shape; D5 historical "smoke tape" → "smoke evidence" rename (tape only for ledger chain); D6 5 memory updates approved; D7 NO constitution amendment (this is roadmap/testing-platform gap, not constitutional). Goal: at least one LLM-driven run traverses rtool/context → Agent proposal → WorkTx → Sequencer::apply_one → LedgerWriter::commit → on-disk ChainTape → replay/verify_chain/reconstruct, producing ≥1 accepted L4 + ≥1 rejected L4.E entries with valid system_signature + parent_ledger_root chain + CAS payload linkage + agent audit trail (proposal CIDs only; NO chain-of-thought). 8 atoms per ruling § 3.6: Atom 0 charter+naming cleanup → Atom 1 production runtime repo bootstrap (RuntimeChaintapeConfig; bus.rs + main.rs; STEP_B preflight) → Atom 2 evaluator → Sequencer adapter → Atom 3 chain-backed smoke run (mathd_algebra_107) → Atom 4 verify_chaintape CLI → Atom 5 agent audit trail → Atom 6 fork visibility → Atom 7 audit + ship. Forbidden: SlashTx, NodeMarket/RSP-M, AMM, P6 expansion, MetaTape, public chain, new TypedTx variants, new state-root domains, new monetary cascade, agent chain-of-thought broadcast/persistence, calling pre-TB-6 paper trail "smoke tape"/"chaintape"/"tape", Gemini-degraded-mode label-omission. Charter: handover/tracer_bullets/TB-6_charter_2026-05-01.md. STEP_B preflight (deferred to Atom 1): handover/ai-direct/TB-6_PRODUCTION_CHAINTAPE_BOOTSTRAP_2026-05-01.md.

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	# TuringOS v4
     2	
     3	## What
     4	Silicon-Native Microkernel for LLM Formal Verification Swarm.
     5	Rust 2021, tokio, serde_json. Mission: MiniF2F Lean 4.
     6	
     7	## Why
     8	- 唯一对齐文档: `constitution.md` (反奥利奥架构)
     9	- 压缩即智能: 抽象原则进宪法 / 具体情境进 `cases/`
    10	- 机制 > 参数 > 提示 (Art. V + C-021/C-031/C-034/C-043)
    11	
    12	## Code Standard (Art. I.1 + C-004 + C-027)
    13	- `cargo check` / `cargo test` 必过；`.env` 永不 commit
    14	- `src/{kernel,bus}.rs` + `src/sdk/tools/wallet.rs` + `src/state/sequencer.rs` 改动走 STEP_B_PROTOCOL（不直接编辑 main）
    15	- 任何影响行为的参数必须 env/config 可覆盖，不可硬编码
    16	
    17	## Audit Standard (Art. V.1 + C-010 + C-023 + C-035)
    18	- Generator ≠ Evaluator：代码作者不可是唯一审计者
    19	- 所有 merge / phase 决策双外审（Codex + Gemini）；VETO > CHALLENGE > PASS
    20	- 宪法违规立即 BLOCKER，不可延期、不可"可接受"
    21	
    22	## Report Standard (Art. I.2 + Art. II.2.1 + Art. IV 强制, C-052 + C-053 + C-057 + C-059 + C-061)
    23	- **主指标**（每报必填）: ΣPPUT + Mean PPUT (solved) + 95% CI (Wilson)
    24	- Art. I.2 三大统计信号不可缺: **信誉** (reputation_distribution p50/p90/max) + 效用 (PPUT) + 共识 (如适用)
    25	- Art. IV 终态区分: `halt_reason_distribution` {OmegaAccepted, MaxTxExhausted, WallClockCap, ComputeCapViolated, ErrorHalt}
    26	- 多 agent (n≥2) 专用: `parent_selection_entropy` + `pairwise_payload_diversity_mean`；任一 < 0.25 = Art. II.2.1 告警
    27	- solve count 不可独立陈述，必须配对 PPUT；以 solve count 起头 = 违宪
    28	
    29	## Reproducibility Standard (Art. I + C-012/C-016/C-032/C-039)
    30	- OMEGA accept 必留 self-contained artifact (`proofs/*.lean` + `gp_payload`)
    31	- 度量工具上线即冻结；Oracle 参数冻结；实验禁混 Oracle 模式
    32	- 中间件若修改数学内容 → 是 ArchitectAI 贡献，不是 swarm 涌现（C-023）
    33	
    34	## Alignment Standard (Art. IV + C-069)
    35	- 权威对齐文件: `handover/alignment/TRACE_MATRIX_v0_2026-04-22.md`
    36	  (后续 rev: `TRACE_MATRIX_vN.md`)
    37	- 每个 src/ pub 符号必须映射到宪法 flowchart 元素、标 orphan+justification、
    38	  或 BLOCK merge。doc-comment backlink 格式: `/// TRACE_MATRIX <FC-id>: <role>`
    39	- Conformance tests: `tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs` — 每个 ✅ 行 ≥1
    40	  witness test；`#[ignore]` stub 覆盖 📅 deferred rows
    41	- 宪法 flowchart 修改仅 human architect 可触发，需重跑 Phase Z′ 6-stage
    42	- constitution.md hygiene 观察登记到 `handover/alignment/OBS_*.md`，不改宪法
    43	
    44	## Common Law (宪法 + 判例)
    45	宪法高度压缩，具体裁决查 `cases/C-xxx.yaml` (facts → ruling → precedent)
    46	- 按条款查: `grep -l "Art. I.1" cases/*.yaml`
    47	- 映射：`cases/V3_LESSONS.md` (50 v3 教训 → 现行判例)
    48	- 编号跳号：C-038 / C-042 为 reserved（见 C-041/C-043 预引用）
    49	
    50	## Docs (按需加载)
    51	| 文档 | 何时加载 |
    52	|------|---------|
    53	| `docs/architecture.md` | 修改 src/ 核心模块时 |
    54	| `docs/economics.md` | 修改经济引擎 (wallet/market) 时 |
    55	| `docs/hardware.md` | SSH/部署/远程操作时 |
    56	| `docs/experiments.md` | 创建或运行实验时 |
    57	| `docs/rules.md` | 触发规则或修改规则时 |
    58	
    59	## User
    60	独狼研究员, 零编程基础 vibe coder. 中文为主, 技术术语英文可.

  1672	            // assert_complete_set_balanced from dispatch arm (was test-
  1673	            // only). This ensures the 1 Coin → 1 YES_E + 1 NO_E identity
  1674	            // is enforced live, not just in test fixtures.
  1675	            crate::economy::monetary_invariant::assert_complete_set_balanced(
  1676	                &q_next.economic_state_t,
  1677	            )
  1678	            .map_err(|_| TransitionError::MonetaryInvariantViolation)?;
  1679	
  1680	            // Step 6: state_root advance.
  1681	            q_next.state_root_t = complete_set_mint_accept_state_root(&q.state_root_t, tx);
  1682	
  1683	            Ok((q_next, SignalBundle::default()))
  1684	        }
  1685	        // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1686	        // TB-13 Atom 2 — CompleteSetRedeemTx accept arm (architect §4.3 +
  1687	        // FR-13.4..5 + SG-13.5..6).
  1688	        //
  1689	        // Validation:
  1690	        //   - task_markets_t[event_id.0].state must be Finalized (Yes) or
  1691	        //     Bankrupt (No); else RedeemBeforeResolution.
  1692	        //   - claimed_outcome must match the state; else InvalidResolutionRef.
  1693	        //   - owner's winning-side share balance must cover share_amount;
  1694	        //     else RedeemMoreThanOwned.
  1695	        //   - event collateral must cover share_amount; else
  1696	        //     InsufficientCollateral.
  1697	        //
  1698	        // Effect: 1 share → 1 MicroCoin (architect §4.3: "after YES outcome
  1699	        // pays YES shares"). Debit shares + collateral; credit balance.
  1700	        // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1701	        TypedTx::CompleteSetRedeem(redeem) => {
  1702	            if redeem.parent_state_root != q.state_root_t {
  1703	                return Err(TransitionError::StaleParent);
  1704	            }
  1705	            // Step 1: claimed_outcome consistency between resolution_ref and
  1706	            // outcome field — both must agree before we even check state.
  1707	            if redeem.outcome != redeem.resolution_ref.claimed_outcome {
  1708	                return Err(TransitionError::InvalidResolutionRef);
  1709	            }
  1710	            // Step 2: lookup task_markets_t state.
  1711	            let market_state = q
  1712	                .economic_state_t
  1713	                .task_markets_t
  1714	                .0
  1715	                .get(&redeem.event_id.0)
  1716	                .map(|m| m.state)
  1717	                .ok_or(TransitionError::RedeemBeforeResolution)?;
  1718	            match (market_state, redeem.outcome) {
  1719	                (crate::state::q_state::TaskMarketState::Finalized,
  1720	                 crate::state::typed_tx::OutcomeSide::Yes) => { /* ok — YES wins */ }
  1721	                (crate::state::q_state::TaskMarketState::Bankrupt,
  1722	                 crate::state::typed_tx::OutcomeSide::No) => { /* ok — NO wins */ }
  1723	                (crate::state::q_state::TaskMarketState::Finalized, _)
  1724	                | (crate::state::q_state::TaskMarketState::Bankrupt, _) => {
  1725	                    return Err(TransitionError::InvalidResolutionRef);
  1726	                }
  1727	                (crate::state::q_state::TaskMarketState::Open, _)
  1728	                | (crate::state::q_state::TaskMarketState::Expired, _) => {
  1729	                    return Err(TransitionError::RedeemBeforeResolution);
  1730	                }
  1731	            }
  1732	            // Step 3: owner's share balance for the winning side.
  1733	            let pair = q
  1734	                .economic_state_t
  1735	                .conditional_share_balances_t
  1736	                .0
  1737	                .get(&redeem.owner)
  1738	                .and_then(|m| m.get(&redeem.event_id))
  1739	                .copied()
  1740	                .unwrap_or_default();
  1741	            let owned_units = match redeem.outcome {
  1742	                crate::state::typed_tx::OutcomeSide::Yes => pair.yes.units,
  1743	                crate::state::typed_tx::OutcomeSide::No => pair.no.units,
  1744	            };
  1745	            if owned_units < redeem.share_amount.units {
  1746	                return Err(TransitionError::RedeemMoreThanOwned);
  1747	            }
  1748	            // Step 4: collateral coverage (defensive; should hold if
  1749	            // assert_complete_set_balanced is preserved).
  1750	            let event_collateral = q
  1751	                .economic_state_t
  1752	                .conditional_collateral_t
  1753	                .0
  1754	                .get(&redeem.event_id)
  1755	                .copied()
  1756	                .unwrap_or(crate::economy::money::MicroCoin::zero());
  1757	            if (event_collateral.micro_units() as u128) < redeem.share_amount.units {
  1758	                return Err(TransitionError::InsufficientCollateral);
  1759	            }
  1760	
  1761	            // Step 5: build q_next.
  1762	            let mut q_next = q.clone();
  1763	            // 5a: debit the winning side from owner's share balance.
  1764	            {
  1765	                let owner_shares = q_next
  1766	                    .economic_state_t
  1767	                    .conditional_share_balances_t
  1768	                    .0
  1769	                    .entry(redeem.owner.clone())
  1770	                    .or_insert_with(std::collections::BTreeMap::new);
  1771	                let pair = owner_shares
  1772	                    .entry(redeem.event_id.clone())
  1773	                    .or_insert(crate::state::q_state::ShareSidePair::default());
  1774	                match redeem.outcome {
  1775	                    crate::state::typed_tx::OutcomeSide::Yes => {
  1776	                        pair.yes = crate::state::typed_tx::ShareAmount::from_units(
  1777	                            pair.yes.units - redeem.share_amount.units,
  1778	                        );
  1779	                    }
  1780	                    crate::state::typed_tx::OutcomeSide::No => {
  1781	                        pair.no = crate::state::typed_tx::ShareAmount::from_units(
  1782	                            pair.no.units - redeem.share_amount.units,
  1783	                        );
  1784	                    }
  1785	                }
  1786	            }
  1787	            // 5b: debit collateral.
  1788	            {
  1789	                let collateral_entry = q_next
  1790	                    .economic_state_t
  1791	                    .conditional_collateral_t
  1792	                    .0
  1793	                    .entry(redeem.event_id.clone())
  1794	                    .or_insert(crate::economy::money::MicroCoin::zero());
  1795	                *collateral_entry = crate::economy::money::MicroCoin::from_micro_units(
  1796	                    collateral_entry.micro_units() - redeem.share_amount.units as i64,
  1797	                );
  1798	            }
  1799	            // 5c: credit owner's balance 1:1 (1 winning share = 1 MicroCoin).
  1800	            let owner_bal = q_next
  1801	                .economic_state_t
  1802	                .balances_t
  1803	                .0
  1804	                .get(&redeem.owner)
  1805	                .copied()
  1806	                .unwrap_or(crate::economy::money::MicroCoin::zero());
  1807	            q_next.economic_state_t.balances_t.0.insert(
  1808	                redeem.owner.clone(),
  1809	                crate::economy::money::MicroCoin::from_micro_units(
  1810	                    owner_bal.micro_units() + redeem.share_amount.units as i64,
  1811	                ),
  1812	            );
  1813	
  1814	            // Step 6: monetary invariants.
  1815	            assert_no_post_init_mint(tx, q)
  1816	                .map_err(|_| TransitionError::MonetaryInvariantViolation)?;
  1817	            assert_total_ctf_conserved(
  1818	                &q.economic_state_t,
  1819	                &q_next.economic_state_t,
  1820	                &[],
  1821	            )
  1822	            .map_err(|_| TransitionError::MonetaryInvariantViolation)?;
  1823	            crate::economy::monetary_invariant::assert_complete_set_balanced(
  1824	                &q_next.economic_state_t,
  1825	            )
  1826	            .map_err(|_| TransitionError::MonetaryInvariantViolation)?;
  1827	
  1828	            // Step 7: state_root advance.
  1829	            q_next.state_root_t = complete_set_redeem_accept_state_root(&q.state_root_t, tx);
  1830	
  1831	            Ok((q_next, SignalBundle::default()))
  1832	        }
  1833	        // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1834	        // TB-13 Atom 2 — MarketSeedTx accept arm (architect §4.3 + FR-13.6..7 +
  1835	        // SG-13.3..4). Provider explicitly funds collateral + receives BOTH
  1836	        // YES + NO share inventory. **No trading. No quoting. No pricing.**
  1837	        // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1838	        TypedTx::MarketSeed(seed) => {
  1839	            if seed.parent_state_root != q.state_root_t {
  1840	                return Err(TransitionError::StaleParent);
  1841	            }
  1842	            // Step 1: collateral_amount > 0 strictly (architect SG-13.4).
  1843	            // `<= 0` rejects both zero (architect direct mandate) and
  1844	            // negative (would mirror the V1 attack on CompleteSetMint —
  1845	            // negative collateral + huge u128 shares). Codex round-1
  1846	            // VETO TB13-V1 remediation (2026-05-03).
  1847	            if seed.collateral_amount.micro_units() <= 0 {
  1848	                return Err(TransitionError::InsufficientCollateral);
  1849	            }
  1850	            // Step 1.5: event state gate (Gemini round-2 CHALLENGE Q13
  1851	            // remediation 2026-05-03). Same rationale as CompleteSetMint
  1852	            // step 2.5: reject seeding into a closed/missing event.
  1853	            let seed_market_state = q
  1854	                .economic_state_t
  1855	                .task_markets_t
  1856	                .0
  1857	                .get(&seed.event_id.0)
  1858	                .map(|m| m.state)
  1859	                .ok_or(TransitionError::TaskNotOpen)?;
  1860	            if seed_market_state != crate::state::q_state::TaskMarketState::Open {
  1861	                return Err(TransitionError::EventNotOpen);
  1862	            }
  1863	            // Step 2: provider solvency (architect SG-13.3).
  1864	            let provider_bal = q
  1865	                .economic_state_t
  1866	                .balances_t
  1867	                .0
  1868	                .get(&seed.provider)
  1869	                .copied()
  1870	                .unwrap_or(crate::economy::money::MicroCoin::zero());
  1871	            if provider_bal.micro_units() < seed.collateral_amount.micro_units() {
  1872	                return Err(TransitionError::InsufficientBalanceForMint);
  1873	            }
  1874	            // Step 3: build q_next — provider balance → collateral + provider
  1875	            // receives BOTH YES + NO share inventory.
  1876	            let mut q_next = q.clone();
  1877	            let new_bal_micro =
  1878	                provider_bal.micro_units() - seed.collateral_amount.micro_units();
  1879	            q_next.economic_state_t.balances_t.0.insert(
  1880	                seed.provider.clone(),
  1881	                crate::economy::money::MicroCoin::from_micro_units(new_bal_micro),
  1882	            );
  1883	            let collateral_entry = q_next
  1884	                .economic_state_t
  1885	                .conditional_collateral_t
  1886	                .0
  1887	                .entry(seed.event_id.clone())
  1888	                .or_insert(crate::economy::money::MicroCoin::zero());
  1889	            *collateral_entry = crate::economy::money::MicroCoin::from_micro_units(
  1890	                collateral_entry.micro_units() + seed.collateral_amount.micro_units(),
  1891	            );
  1892	            let provider_shares = q_next
  1893	                .economic_state_t
  1894	                .conditional_share_balances_t
  1895	                .0
  1896	                .entry(seed.provider.clone())
  1897	                .or_insert_with(std::collections::BTreeMap::new);
  1898	            let pair = provider_shares
  1899	                .entry(seed.event_id.clone())
  1900	                .or_insert(crate::state::q_state::ShareSidePair::default());
  1901	            pair.yes = crate::state::typed_tx::ShareAmount::from_units(
  1902	                pair.yes.units + seed.collateral_amount.micro_units() as u128,
  1903	            );
  1904	            pair.no = crate::state::typed_tx::ShareAmount::from_units(
  1905	                pair.no.units + seed.collateral_amount.micro_units() as u128,
  1906	            );
  1907	
  1908	            // Step 4: monetary invariants.
  1909	            assert_no_post_init_mint(tx, q)
  1910	                .map_err(|_| TransitionError::MonetaryInvariantViolation)?;
  1911	            assert_total_ctf_conserved(
  1912	                &q.economic_state_t,
  1913	                &q_next.economic_state_t,
  1914	                &[],
  1915	            )
  1916	            .map_err(|_| TransitionError::MonetaryInvariantViolation)?;
  1917	            crate::economy::monetary_invariant::assert_complete_set_balanced(
  1918	                &q_next.economic_state_t,
  1919	            )
  1920	            .map_err(|_| TransitionError::MonetaryInvariantViolation)?;
  1921	
  1922	            // Step 5: state_root advance.
  1923	            q_next.state_root_t = market_seed_accept_state_root(&q.state_root_t, tx);
  1924	
  1925	            Ok((q_next, SignalBundle::default()))
  1926	        }
  1927	    }
  1928	}
