   150	/// `task_markets_t[t].bounty` is removed. Bounty money has migrated to
   151	/// `escrows_t.amount` via accepted `EscrowLockTx`. `task_markets_t` retains
   152	/// only the cached aggregate `total_escrow` (NOT in supply sum) + admission
   153	/// metadata.
   154	///
   155	/// **TB-8 5→4 holding migration** (2026-05-02): `claims_t.amount` is removed
   156	/// from the holding sum. Per TB-8 charter §3 Atom 3 + ratification §1 Q5:
   157	/// the FinalizeReward dispatch arm moves money DIRECTLY from `escrows_t` to
   158	/// `balances_t` (not via claims_t as an intermediate holding). `claims_t` is
   159	/// the *intent registry*: claim creation at OMEGA-Confirm records "this
   160	/// solver is owed this amount" without moving money; the money still lives
   161	/// in `escrows_t` until finalize debits it. The `claim.amount` field is the
   162	/// cached intent (= `task_market.total_escrow` at claim creation per single-
   163	/// solver MVP). Counting `claims_t` here while ALSO counting the backing
   164	/// `escrows_t` rows would double-mint every claim. The intent-vs-backing
   165	/// integrity is enforced separately by
   166	/// [`assert_claim_amount_backed_by_escrow`].
   167	///
   168	/// **Pre-TB-8 baseline**: `claims_t` was always empty (the dispatch arm was
   169	/// `NotYetImplemented`); removing it from the sum changes nothing for
   170	/// historical L4 replay (forward-only schema migration per
   171	/// `feedback_no_retroactive_evidence_rewrite`).
   172	fn total_supply_micro(s: &EconomicState) -> Result<i64, MonetaryError> {
   173	    let mut total: i64 = 0;
   174	    for v in s.balances_t.0.values() {
   175	        total = total.checked_add(v.micro_units()).ok_or(MonetaryError::Overflow)?;
   176	    }
   177	    for e in s.escrows_t.0.values() {
   178	        total = total.checked_add(e.amount.micro_units()).ok_or(MonetaryError::Overflow)?;
   179	    }
   180	    for e in s.stakes_t.0.values() {
   181	        total = total.checked_add(e.amount.micro_units()).ok_or(MonetaryError::Overflow)?;
   182	    }
   183	    // claims_t is INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — intent registry, not a holding
   184	    // (TB-8 charter §3 Atom 3 + ratification §1 Q5). The backing money lives
   185	    // in escrows_t; counting claims_t here would double-mint every claim.
   186	    // task_markets_t.total_escrow is INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — derived cache,
   187	    // not a holding (TB-3 charter § 3.2). Counting it would double-mint
   188	    // every bounty: the same micro-coins are already counted in escrows_t.
   189	    for c in s.challenge_cases_t.0.values() {
   190	        total = total.checked_add(c.bond.micro_units()).ok_or(MonetaryError::Overflow)?;
   191	    }
   192	    // TB-13 Atom 2 (architect 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling Part A §4.3 +
   193	    // CR-13.4): conditional_collateral_t IS a Coin holding — locked Coin
   194	    // held against outstanding YES_E + NO_E share inventory. Extends the
   195	    // 5-holding sum to 6. Without this, CompleteSetMintTx (which migrates
   196	    // Coin from balances_t to conditional_collateral_t) would falsely
   197	    // appear to burn money, failing assert_total_ctf_conserved with empty
   198	    // exempt list.
   199	    //
   200	    // conditional_share_balances_t is INTENTIONALLY OMITTED per CR-13.3 +
   201	    // SG-13.2 — shares are CLAIMS against conditional_collateral_t, not
   202	    // a holding. Counting them would triple-count (shares are derived from
   203	    // collateral; including both creates a 2x parallel ledger).
   204	    for c in s.conditional_collateral_t.0.values() {
   205	        total = total.checked_add(c.micro_units()).ok_or(MonetaryError::Overflow)?;
   206	    }
   207	    Ok(total)
   208	}

   211	// TB-8 Atom 1 — assert_claim_amount_backed_by_escrow (intent-vs-backing)

   219	/// Replaces the old "claims_t is a holding" semantics with the explicit

   428	// TB-13 Atom 3 — assert_complete_set_balanced (architect 2026-05-03 post-
   429	// TB-12 ruling Part A §4.4 SG-13.1 + §4.5 CR-13.3..4)
   430	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   431	
   432	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 3 (architect §4.3 + SG-13.1): the
   433	/// **complete-set balanced** invariant.
   434	///
   435	/// For every event in `conditional_collateral_t`:
   436	///
   437	/// ```text
   438	/// min(Σ_{owner} share[(owner, event, Yes)], Σ_{owner} share[(owner, event, No)])
   439	///   == collateral[event].micro_units()
   440	/// ```
   441	///
   442	/// Why MIN, not equality on both sides:
   443	/// - Pre-resolution (mint + seed only): both sides equal collateral, so
   444	///   `min == collateral` is trivially equivalent to `Yes == No == collateral`.
   445	/// - Post-resolution + partial redeem: the winning side decreases by the
   446	///   redeemed amount AND collateral decreases by the same amount; the
   447	///   losing side stays the same (its shares are stranded zero-value
   448	///   claims). So `winning_side == collateral` still holds, while
   449	///   `losing_side > collateral` (losing side has surplus). MIN picks
   450	///   the winning side and matches collateral.
   451	/// - Post-resolution + full redeem: winning side is 0, collateral is 0,
   452	///   losing side is the original mint amount. MIN(0, original) = 0 = collateral.
   453	///
   454	/// This is the mathematical core of "1 Coin = 1 YES_E + 1 NO_E" enforced
   455	/// at the QState level: every Coin in collateral can be redeemed by the
   456	/// winning side, and no winning-side share is unbacked.
   457	pub fn assert_complete_set_balanced(
   458	    s: &EconomicState,
   459	) -> Result<(), MonetaryError> {
   460	    use crate::state::typed_tx::OutcomeSide;
   461	    for (event_id, collateral) in s.conditional_collateral_t.0.iter() {
   462	        let collateral_units: u128 = collateral.micro_units() as u128;
   463	        let mut sum_yes: u128 = 0;
   464	        let mut sum_no: u128 = 0;
   465	        for owner_map in s.conditional_share_balances_t.0.values() {
   466	            if let Some(pair) = owner_map.get(event_id) {
   467	                sum_yes = sum_yes
   468	                    .checked_add(pair.yes.units)
   469	                    .ok_or(MonetaryError::Overflow)?;
   470	                sum_no = sum_no
   471	                    .checked_add(pair.no.units)
   472	                    .ok_or(MonetaryError::Overflow)?;
   473	            }
   474	        }
   475	        let min_side = sum_yes.min(sum_no);
   476	        if min_side != collateral_units {
   477	            // Report the failing side (the smaller one) for diagnostic
   478	            // clarity — that's where the equality-with-collateral broke.
   479	            let (side, share_sum_units) = if sum_yes <= sum_no {
   480	                (OutcomeSide::Yes, sum_yes)
   481	            } else {
   482	                (OutcomeSide::No, sum_no)
   483	            };
   484	            return Err(MonetaryError::CompleteSetUnbalanced {
   485	                event_id_hex: hex_event_id(event_id),
   486	                side,
   487	                share_sum_units,
   488	                collateral_units,
   489	            });
   490	        }
   491	    }
   492	    Ok(())
   493	}
   494	
   495	fn hex_event_id(event_id: &crate::state::typed_tx::EventId) -> String {
   496	    event_id.0 .0.clone()
   497	}

   500	// Tests
   501	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   502	
   503	#[cfg(test)]
   504	mod tests {
   505	    use super::*;

  1056	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1057	// § 5c-TB-13 — CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx conditional shares
  1058	//
  1059	// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling Part A
  1060	// §4.3 + §4.4 FR-13.1..7 + §4.5 CR-13.1..6).
  1061	//
  1062	// **Mathematical core**: `1 locked Coin = 1 YES_E + 1 NO_E`.
  1063	// `CompleteSetMintTx` debits Coin balance, locks it as `conditional_collateral_t`,
  1064	// mints equal YES_E + NO_E shares to the same owner. `CompleteSetRedeemTx`
  1065	// requires a system-resolved outcome reference and pays the winning side
  1066	// 1:1 against `conditional_collateral_t`. `MarketSeedTx` requires explicit
  1067	// provider funds; no auto-seed, no quote, no trade, no price.
  1068	//
  1069	// **Forbidden in TB-13** (architect §4.7): AMM / CPMM / orderbook /
  1070	// MarketOrderTx / MarketTradeTx / PriceIndex / DPMM / pro-rata / automatic
  1071	// liquidity / ghost liquidity / NodeMarketEntry as canonical state / f64.
  1072	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1073	
  1074	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): event identifier for
  1075	/// conditional shares. TB-13 maps `EventId` 1:1 to `TaskId` (the event
  1076	/// being resolved is "this task got finalized YES via FinalizeRewardTx
  1077	/// vs. died NO via TaskBankruptcyTx"); future TB-14+ may decouple to
  1078	/// per-node events.
  1079	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1080	pub struct EventId(pub TaskId);
  1081	
  1082	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): outcome-side discriminator
  1083	/// for conditional shares. Yes = "this event was finalized YES";
  1084	/// No = "this event went bankrupt / was rejected".
  1085	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize)]
  1086	#[repr(u8)]
  1087	pub enum OutcomeSide {
  1088	    Yes = 0,
  1089	    No = 1,
  1090	}
  1091	
  1092	impl Default for OutcomeSide {
  1093	    fn default() -> Self {
  1094	        Self::Yes
  1095	    }
  1096	}
  1097	
  1098	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): non-negative share count.
  1099	///
  1100	/// Architect spec uses `units: i128`; we tighten to `u128` because TB-13
  1101	/// shares can never be negative (mint creates positive, redeem decreases
  1102	/// positive, no debt model). Underflow at redeem time is a sequencer
  1103	/// `RedeemMoreThanOwned` rejection, not a representation concern.
  1104	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1105	pub struct ShareAmount {
  1106	    pub units: u128,
  1107	}
  1108	
  1109	impl ShareAmount {
  1110	    /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): zero share amount —
  1111	    /// default constructor for empty share balance lookups.
  1112	    pub const fn zero() -> Self {
  1113	        Self { units: 0 }
  1114	    }
  1115	    /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): build a `ShareAmount`
  1116	    /// from a raw `u128` units count. Used by sequencer mint/redeem arms
  1117	    /// (Atom 2) to project `MicroCoin::micro_units() as u128` into the
  1118	    /// share-claim domain.
  1119	    pub const fn from_units(units: u128) -> Self {
  1120	        Self { units }
  1121	    }
  1122	}
  1123	
  1124	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): system-resolution reference
  1125	/// embedded in `CompleteSetRedeemTx`. References either a
  1126	/// `TaskBankruptcyTx` (outcome must be `OutcomeSide::No`) or a
  1127	/// `FinalizeRewardTx` (outcome must be `OutcomeSide::Yes`) for the
  1128	/// referenced `EventId.0 == task_id`. Sequencer validates the reference
  1129	/// exists in L4 + outcome matches before allowing redeem (architect
  1130	/// FR-13.4 + SG-13.5).
  1131	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1132	pub struct ResolutionRef {
  1133	    pub resolution_tx_id: TxId,
  1134	    pub claimed_outcome: OutcomeSide,
  1135	}
  1136	
  1137	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3 + FR-13.1..3): mint conditional
  1138	/// shares against locked Coin collateral.
  1139	///
  1140	/// Sequencer arm (Atom 2):
  1141	/// 1. `balances_t[owner] >= amount` else `InsufficientBalanceForMint`.
  1142	/// 2. `balances_t[owner] -= amount`.
  1143	/// 3. `conditional_collateral_t[event_id] += amount`.
  1144	/// 4. `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event_id, Yes)] += amount.units`.
  1145	/// 5. `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event_id, No)]  += amount.units`.
  1146	///
  1147	/// CTF preserved: balance debit equals collateral credit; YES/NO shares
  1148	/// are claims (not Coin) per CR-13.3 / SG-13.2.
  1149	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1150	pub struct CompleteSetMintTx {
  1151	    pub tx_id: TxId,                          //  1
  1152	    pub parent_state_root: Hash,              //  2
  1153	    pub event_id: EventId,                    //  3
  1154	    pub owner: AgentId,                       //  4
  1155	    pub amount: MicroCoin,                    //  5
  1156	    pub signature: AgentSignature,            //  6
  1157	    pub timestamp_logical: u64,               //  7
  1158	}
  1159	
  1160	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3 + FR-13.4..5 + SG-13.5..6):
  1161	/// redeem winning conditional shares post-resolution.
  1162	///
  1163	/// Sequencer arm (Atom 2):
  1164	/// 1. Lookup `resolution_ref.resolution_tx_id` in L4 accepted set.
  1165	///    - If `TaskBankruptcyTx` for `event_id.0`: claimed_outcome must be
  1166	///      `No` else `InvalidResolutionRef`.
  1167	///    - If `FinalizeRewardTx` for `event_id.0`: claimed_outcome must be
  1168	///      `Yes` else `InvalidResolutionRef`.
  1169	///    - Else: `RedeemBeforeResolution` (no acceptable resolution).
  1170	/// 2. `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event_id, outcome)] >= share_amount.units`
  1171	///    else `RedeemMoreThanOwned`.
  1172	/// 3. `conditional_collateral_t[event_id] >= share_amount.units` else
  1173	///    `InsufficientCollateral` (defensive; should never fire if
  1174	///    `assert_complete_set_balanced` holds).
  1175	/// 4. Debit shares; debit collateral; credit `balances_t[owner]` 1:1.
  1176	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1177	pub struct CompleteSetRedeemTx {
  1178	    pub tx_id: TxId,                          //  1
  1179	    pub parent_state_root: Hash,              //  2
  1180	    pub event_id: EventId,                    //  3
  1181	    pub owner: AgentId,                       //  4
  1182	    pub outcome: OutcomeSide,                 //  5
  1183	    pub share_amount: ShareAmount,            //  6
  1184	    pub resolution_ref: ResolutionRef,        //  7
  1185	    pub signature: AgentSignature,            //  8
  1186	    pub timestamp_logical: u64,               //  9
  1187	}
  1188	
  1189	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3 + FR-13.6..7): explicit
  1190	/// provider-funded protocol-owned share inventory seed. **NO trading,
  1191	/// NO quoting, NO pricing.**
  1192	///
  1193	/// Sequencer arm (Atom 2):
  1194	/// 1. `collateral_amount > 0` else `InsufficientCollateral` (SG-13.4).
  1195	/// 2. `balances_t[provider] >= collateral_amount` else
  1196	///    `InsufficientBalanceForMint` (SG-13.3).
  1197	/// 3. `balances_t[provider] -= collateral_amount`.
  1198	/// 4. `conditional_collateral_t[event_id] += collateral_amount`.
  1199	/// 5. Provider receives BOTH sides of share inventory:
  1200	///    `conditional_share_balances_t[(provider, event_id, Yes)] += collateral_amount.units`
  1201	///    `conditional_share_balances_t[(provider, event_id, No)]  += collateral_amount.units`.
  1202	///
  1203	/// The shape is identical to `CompleteSetMintTx` post-effect; the
  1204	/// distinction is semantic ("mint" = claim against own bet vs "seed" =
  1205	/// protocol-owned inventory pre-resolution). Future tracer-bullets may
  1206	/// treat seeded liquidity differently — TB-13 itself records only the
  1207	/// fact of seeding, not any signal derived from it.
  1208	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1209	pub struct MarketSeedTx {
  1210	    pub tx_id: TxId,                          //  1
  1211	    pub parent_state_root: Hash,              //  2
  1212	    pub event_id: EventId,                    //  3
  1213	    pub provider: AgentId,                    //  4
  1214	    pub collateral_amount: MicroCoin,         //  5
  1215	    pub signature: AgentSignature,            //  6
  1216	    pub timestamp_logical: u64,               //  7
  1217	}
  1218	
  1219	// ── TB-13 SigningPayloads ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  1220	

codex
The current sequencer has post-prompt remediation: mint and seed are now gated to `TaskMarketState::Open`, so the adversarial “mint after resolution” sequence stops at the remint step on HEAD. I also found a doc/code mismatch around `ResolutionRef`: schema comments still promise L4 tx-id lookup, while the live sequencer only uses task-market state plus claimed outcome.

  1840	    /// `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1841	    ChallengeNotFound,
  1842	    /// TB-5 Atom 5 (charter v2 § 4.6 + preflight § 7.2): the targeted
  1843	    /// `ChallengeCase` is already in a non-Open state (Released or
  1844	    /// UpheldDeferred). Idempotency gate — re-resolution of the same
  1845	    /// case is rejected. Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1846	    AlreadyResolved,
  1847	
  1848	    // ── TB-13 Atom 2 (architect 2026-05-03 ruling Part A §4.4 FR-13.1..7) ──
  1849	    /// `CompleteSetMintTx` admission: `balances_t[owner] < amount`.
  1850	    /// Distinct from `InsufficientBalance` to give Information Loom a
  1851	    /// per-tx-class discriminator. Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::InsufficientBalance`.
  1852	    InsufficientBalanceForMint,
  1853	    /// `CompleteSetRedeemTx` admission: the referenced event is in
  1854	    /// `task_markets_t[event_id.0]` but its state is `Open` or `Expired`
  1855	    /// (i.e., neither `Finalized` for YES nor `Bankrupt` for NO). Architect
  1856	    /// FR-13.4 + SG-13.5: redeem unavailable before outcome resolution.
  1857	    /// Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1858	    RedeemBeforeResolution,
  1859	    /// `CompleteSetRedeemTx` admission: the owner's
  1860	    /// `conditional_share_balances_t[owner][event_id].{yes|no}` is less
  1861	    /// than the requested `share_amount.units`. Cannot redeem more than
  1862	    /// owned. Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1863	    RedeemMoreThanOwned,
  1864	    /// `MarketSeedTx` admission: `collateral_amount.micro_units() == 0`.
  1865	    /// Architect SG-13.4: market seed cannot create liquidity without
  1866	    /// collateral. Also fired defensively at `CompleteSetRedeemTx` time
  1867	    /// if `conditional_collateral_t[event_id]` lacks the redeemed amount
  1868	    /// (should never happen if `assert_complete_set_balanced` holds).
  1869	    /// Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1870	    InsufficientCollateral,
  1871	    /// `CompleteSetRedeemTx` admission: the resolution_ref's
  1872	    /// `claimed_outcome` does not match the `task_markets_t[event_id.0]`
  1873	    /// state (e.g., claimed_outcome=Yes but state=Bankrupt, or
  1874	    /// claimed_outcome=No but state=Finalized). Architect §4.3 +
  1875	    /// FR-13.5: after-YES pays YES not NO. Maps to
  1876	    /// `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1877	    InvalidResolutionRef,
  1878	    /// TB-13 Atom 6 round-2 (Gemini CHALLENGE Q13 remediation 2026-05-03):
  1879	    /// `CompleteSetMintTx` / `MarketSeedTx` admission rejected because
  1880	    /// the target event's `task_markets_t[event_id.0].state` is not
  1881	    /// `Open` (Finalized / Bankrupt / Expired). Closes a griefing
  1882	    /// surface where an agent could mint shares against a closed
  1883	    /// event and immediately redeem winning side for full refund,
  1884	    /// leaving noise + stranded shares on-chain. Maps to
  1885	    /// `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1886	    EventNotOpen,
  1887	
  1888	    // ── Stub sentinel (CO1.7.5 fills) ──────────────────────────────────────
  1889	    /// Stub return value used by CO1.7.5 unimplemented bodies — preserves
  1890	    /// sequencer + dispatch correctness without forcing transition logic
  1891	    /// into this atom. Audit input: this is intentional, not a code smell.
  1892	    NotYetImplemented,
  1893	}

  1895	impl std::fmt::Display for TransitionError {
  1896	    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {
  1897	        match self {
  1898	            Self::StaleParent => write!(f, "stale parent_state_root"),
  1899	            Self::SignatureInvalid => write!(f, "agent signature invalid"),
  1900	            Self::InvalidSystemSignature => write!(f, "invalid system signature"),
  1901	            Self::StakeInsufficient => write!(f, "stake / bond insufficient"),
  1902	            Self::TargetWorkTxNotFound => write!(f, "target work_tx not found"),
  1903	            Self::TargetWorkTxNotVerifiable => write!(f, "target work_tx not in a verifiable state"),
  1904	            Self::ParentNotAcceptedYet => write!(f, "parent work_tx not yet accepted"),
  1905	            Self::AcceptancePredicateFailed(p) => write!(f, "acceptance predicate failed: {p:?}"),
  1906	            Self::VerificationPredicateFailed(p) => write!(f, "verification predicate failed: {p:?}"),
  1907	            Self::SettlementPredicateFailed(p) => write!(f, "settlement predicate failed: {p:?}"),
  1908	            Self::ChallengeWindowClosed => write!(f, "challenge window closed"),
  1909	            Self::ChallengeWindowStillOpen => write!(f, "challenge window still open"),
  1910	            Self::AlreadySlashed => write!(f, "already slashed"),
  1911	            Self::CounterexampleInsufficient => write!(f, "counterexample insufficient"),
  1912	            Self::ToolNotInRegistry => write!(f, "reuse tool not in registry"),
  1913	            Self::ToolCreatorMismatch => write!(f, "reuse tool creator mismatch"),
  1914	            Self::ClaimNotFound => write!(f, "claim not found"),
  1915	            Self::ClaimAlreadyFinalized => write!(
  1916	                f,
  1917	                "claim already finalized (idempotent re-finalize rejected)"
  1918	            ),
  1919	            Self::TaskNotFound => write!(f, "task not found"),
  1920	            Self::TaskNotExpired => write!(f, "task deadline not yet reached"),
  1921	            Self::TaskHasOpenClaim => write!(f, "task has at least one open claim"),
  1922	            Self::TerminalSummaryNotApplicable => write!(f, "terminal summary not applicable"),
  1923	            Self::EscrowMissing => write!(f, "escrow / task-market entry missing for task_id"),
  1924	            Self::MonetaryInvariantViolation => write!(f, "monetary invariant violation (post-init mint or ctf-conservation break)"),
  1925	            Self::TaskAlreadyOpen => write!(f, "task market already open for task_id"),
  1926	            Self::TaskNotOpen => write!(f, "no open task market for task_id"),
  1927	            Self::InsufficientBalance => write!(f, "balance below required debit amount"),
  1928	            Self::BondInsufficient => write!(f, "verifier bond insufficient"),
  1929	            Self::TargetWorkInactive => write!(f, "target work_tx not in stakes_t (never accepted live, or already resolved)"),
  1930	            Self::EmptyCounterexample => write!(f, "challenge counterexample_cid is empty / zero"),
  1931	            Self::SystemTxForbiddenOnAgentIngress => write!(
  1932	                f,
  1933	                "system-emitted tx variant forbidden on agent ingress \
  1934	                 (Anti-Oreo dispatch-side defensive guard; primary barrier \
  1935	                 is Sequencer::submit_agent_tx pre-queue)"
  1936	            ),
  1937	            Self::InvalidSystemSignatureLive => write!(
  1938	                f,
  1939	                "system_signature failed live verification against pinned \
  1940	                 PinnedSystemPubkeys for current epoch (apply_one stage 1.5 \
  1941	                 defense-in-depth; primary guarantee is emit_system_tx \
  1942	                 internal signing)"
  1943	            ),
  1944	            Self::ChallengeNotFound => write!(
  1945	                f,
  1946	                "ChallengeResolveTx target_challenge_tx_id not present in challenge_cases_t"
  1947	            ),
  1948	            Self::AlreadyResolved => write!(
  1949	                f,
  1950	                "ChallengeCase already resolved (status != Open); idempotent re-resolution rejected"
  1951	            ),
  1952	            Self::InsufficientBalanceForMint => write!(
  1953	                f,
  1954	                "CompleteSetMintTx: owner's balances_t entry is below the requested mint amount"
  1955	            ),
  1956	            Self::RedeemBeforeResolution => write!(
  1957	                f,
  1958	                "CompleteSetRedeemTx: event task_markets_t state is Open or Expired (no system-emitted resolution yet)"
  1959	            ),
  1960	            Self::RedeemMoreThanOwned => write!(
  1961	                f,
  1962	                "CompleteSetRedeemTx: owner's conditional share balance is below the requested redeem amount"
  1963	            ),
  1964	            Self::InsufficientCollateral => write!(
  1965	                f,
  1966	                "TB-13 collateral missing: MarketSeed with zero collateral, or Redeem against insufficient conditional_collateral_t"
  1967	            ),
  1968	            Self::InvalidResolutionRef => write!(
  1969	                f,
  1970	                "CompleteSetRedeemTx: resolution_ref.claimed_outcome does not match task_markets_t[event_id.0] state"
  1971	            ),
  1972	            Self::EventNotOpen => write!(

  1974	                "TB-13 mint/seed: target event's task_markets_t state is not Open (Finalized/Bankrupt/Expired)"
  1975	            ),
  1976	            Self::NotYetImplemented => write!(f, "transition body not yet implemented (CO1.7.5)"),
  1977	        }
  1978	    }
  1979	}
  1980	impl std::error::Error for TransitionError {}

   193	    /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 2 (architect 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling Part A
   194	    /// §4.3 + §4.4 FR-13.1..7 + CR-13.4): conditional collateral per event.
   195	    /// Locked Coin held against outstanding YES_E + NO_E share inventory.

   198	    /// holding"); included in the 6-holding `total_supply_micro` sum
   199	    /// (extends the TB-7R 5-holding sum). Mint/seed credit; redeem debit.
   200	    /// 1 Coin → 1 YES_E + 1 NO_E mathematical identity (SG-13.1) ensures
   201	    /// `Σ_{event} conditional_collateral_t[event].units == Σ shares per side`.
   202	    ///
   203	    /// `#[serde(default)]` for backward-compat with pre-TB-13 chain snapshots.

   208	    ///
   209	    /// **IS NOT** a Coin holding — shares are CLAIMS against
   210	    /// `conditional_collateral_t[event_id]`; CR-13.3 + SG-13.2 explicit:
   211	    /// shares are NOT counted in `total_supply_micro`. Mint mints equal
   212	    /// YES + NO; seed mints equal YES + NO to provider; redeem debits the
   213	    /// winning side at 1 share = 1 MicroCoin against collateral.
   214	    ///
   215	    /// `#[serde(default)]` for backward-compat with pre-TB-13 chain snapshots.
   216	    #[serde(default)]
   217	    pub conditional_share_balances_t: ConditionalShareBalances,
   218	}

   520	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   521	// TB-13 (architect 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling Part A §4.3 + §4.4):
   522	// ConditionalCollateralIndex + ConditionalShareBalances — Polymarket / CTF
   523	// conditional-share substrate. **1 locked Coin = 1 YES_E + 1 NO_E.**
   524	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   525	
   526	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 2 (architect §4.3 + CR-13.4): per-event Coin
   527	/// collateral locked against outstanding YES_E + NO_E share inventory.
   528	///
   529	/// **IS** a Coin holding — included in 6-holding `total_supply_micro` sum
   530	/// at `monetary_invariant::assert_total_ctf_conserved`. Mint/seed credit
   531	/// this map; redeem debits it. The complete-set balanced invariant
   532	/// (`assert_complete_set_balanced`) enforces
   533	/// `Σ_{owner} share[(owner, event, Yes)] == Σ_{owner} share[(owner, event, No)] == collateral[event]`.
   534	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
   535	pub struct ConditionalCollateralIndex(
   536	    pub BTreeMap<crate::state::typed_tx::EventId, MicroCoin>,
   537	);
   538	
   539	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 2 (architect §4.3 + CR-13.3 + SG-13.2): per-
   540	/// `(owner, event_id)` share balance pair (YES + NO sides).
   541	///
   542	/// **IS NOT** a Coin holding — shares are claims against
   543	/// `ConditionalCollateralIndex[event_id]`. Architect CR-13.3 / SG-13.2
   544	/// explicit: shares are NOT counted in `total_supply_micro`.
   545	///
   546	/// Wire shape: `BTreeMap<AgentId, BTreeMap<EventId, ShareSidePair>>`.
   547	/// Nested-map shape (rather than tuple-key) keeps the structure
   548	/// JSON-friendly (BTreeMap with tuple keys is not serializable through
   549	/// serde_json) while preserving canonical Owner-major / Event-minor
   550	/// ordering for replay determinism.
   551	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
   552	pub struct ConditionalShareBalances(
   553	    pub BTreeMap<
   554	        AgentId,
   555	        BTreeMap<crate::state::typed_tx::EventId, ShareSidePair>,
   556	    >,
   557	);
   558	
   559	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 2 (architect §4.3 + FR-13.3): YES + NO share
   560	/// holdings for a `(owner, event_id)` pair. Mint and seed credit
   561	/// equally; redeem debits the winning side.
   562	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
   563	pub struct ShareSidePair {
   564	    pub yes: crate::state::typed_tx::ShareAmount,
   565	    pub no: crate::state::typed_tx::ShareAmount,
   566	}
   567	
   568	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-11 (architect §6.2) — per-run summary. Sponsored by
   569	/// `task_id`; populated by the `TerminalSummaryTx` dispatch arm with
   570	/// fields drawn from the typed-tx wire payload (Q-derivable on replay).

     1	//! TB-13 Atom 5 integration tests — CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx per architect
     2	//! 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling Part A §4.4 SG-13.1..8 + halting triggers.
     3	//!
     4	//! "CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx" — Polymarket / CTF conditional-share
     5	//! substrate. **1 locked Coin = 1 YES_E + 1 NO_E.** TB-13 introduces
     6	//! conditional collateral + share balance accounting; redeem requires
     7	//! system-resolved task-market state (Finalized → Yes; Bankrupt → No).
     8	//! TB-13 does NOT introduce trading / pricing / AMM / orderbook —
     9	//! those are deferred to TB-14+.
    10	//!
    11	//! Coverage maps to architect SG-13.0..8 + halting triggers from
    12	//! charter §3 Atom 5 (total_supply_micro mutation correctness / shares
    13	//! NOT counted as Coin / MarketSeed without provider balance / no
    14	//! legacy CPMM / no f64 / no AMM/CPMM router).
    15	//!
    16	//! - SG-13.0.1 legacy_cpm_api_not_imported_by_complete_set       (Atom 0.5 fence)
    17	//! - SG-13.0.2 no_f64_in_complete_set_or_market_seed              (Atom 0.5 fence)
    18	//! - SG-13.0.3 prediction_market_legacy_quarantined               (Atom 0.5 fence)
    19	//! - SG-13.1   mint_one_coin_yields_one_yes_plus_one_no_total_coin_conserved
    20	//! - SG-13.2   yes_no_shares_not_in_total_coin_supply
    21	//! - SG-13.3   market_seed_fails_if_provider_lacks_balance
    22	//! - SG-13.4   market_seed_cannot_create_liquidity_without_collateral
    23	//! - SG-13.5   redeem_unavailable_before_outcome_resolution
    24	//! - SG-13.6   redeem_after_yes_outcome_pays_yes_not_no
    25	//! - SG-13.7   no_f64_in_new_complete_set_or_market_seed_path     (Atom 0.5 fence)
    26	//! - SG-13.8   no_import_or_use_of_legacy_cpmm_in_tb13_modules    (Atom 0.5 fence)
    27	//!
    28	//! /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 5 (architect 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling
    29	//! Part A §4.4 + §4.7 forbidden list; SG-13.0..8).
    30	
    31	use std::collections::BTreeMap;
    32	use std::sync::{Arc, RwLock};
    33	
    34	use tempfile::TempDir;
    35	
    36	use turingosv4::bottom_white::cas::store::CasStore;
    37	use turingosv4::bottom_white::ledger::rejection_evidence::RejectionEvidenceWriter;
    38	use turingosv4::bottom_white::ledger::system_keypair::{
    39	    Ed25519Keypair, PinnedSystemPubkeys, SystemEpoch,
    40	};
    41	use turingosv4::bottom_white::ledger::transition_ledger::{
    42	    InMemoryLedgerWriter, LedgerWriter,
    43	};
    44	use turingosv4::bottom_white::tools::registry::ToolRegistry;
    45	use turingosv4::economy::money::MicroCoin;
    46	use turingosv4::economy::monetary_invariant::{
    47	    assert_complete_set_balanced, assert_total_ctf_conserved,
    48	};
    49	use turingosv4::state::q_state::{
    50	    AgentId, ConditionalCollateralIndex, ConditionalShareBalances, QState,
    51	    ShareSidePair, TaskId, TaskMarketEntry, TaskMarketState, TxId,
    52	};
    53	use turingosv4::state::sequencer::{Sequencer, SubmissionEnvelope};
    54	use turingosv4::state::typed_tx::{
    55	    AgentSignature, CompleteSetMintTx, CompleteSetRedeemTx, EventId,
    56	    MarketSeedTx, OutcomeSide, ResolutionRef, ShareAmount, TypedTx,
    57	};
    58	use turingosv4::top_white::predicates::registry::PredicateRegistry;
    59	
    60	// ── Harness ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    61	
    62	struct Harness {
    63	    _tmp: TempDir,
    64	    seq: Sequencer,
    65	    rx: tokio::sync::mpsc::Receiver<SubmissionEnvelope>,
    66	    _ledger: Arc<RwLock<dyn LedgerWriter>>,
    67	}
    68	
    69	fn fresh_harness(initial_q: QState) -> Harness {
    70	    let tmp = TempDir::new().expect("tempdir");
    71	    let cas = Arc::new(RwLock::new(CasStore::open(tmp.path()).expect("cas")));
    72	    let keypair = Arc::new(Ed25519Keypair::generate_with_secure_entropy().expect("kp"));
    73	    let writer: Arc<RwLock<dyn LedgerWriter>> =
    74	        Arc::new(RwLock::new(InMemoryLedgerWriter::new()));
    75	    let rejection_writer = Arc::new(RwLock::new(RejectionEvidenceWriter::default()));
    76	    let preds = Arc::new(PredicateRegistry::new());
    77	    let tools = Arc::new(ToolRegistry::new());
    78	    let epoch = SystemEpoch::new(1);
    79	    let mut pinned = PinnedSystemPubkeys::new();
    80	    pinned.insert(epoch, keypair.public_key());
    81	    let pinned_pubkeys = Arc::new(pinned);
    82	    let (seq, rx) = Sequencer::new(
    83	        cas, keypair, epoch, writer.clone(), rejection_writer, preds, tools,
    84	        pinned_pubkeys, initial_q, 16,
    85	    );
    86	    Harness { _tmp: tmp, seq, rx, _ledger: writer }
    87	}
    88	
    89	fn genesis_with_balances(pairs: &[(&str, i64)]) -> QState {
    90	    let mut q = QState::genesis();
    91	    for (name, coin) in pairs {
    92	        q.economic_state_t.balances_t.0.insert(
    93	            AgentId((*name).into()),
    94	            MicroCoin::from_coin(*coin).unwrap(),
    95	        );
    96	    }
    97	    q
    98	}
    99	
   100	/// Pre-populate `task_markets_t[task]` with the given state. Used in
   101	/// SG-13.5 / SG-13.6 to simulate a system-emitted resolution (Finalized
   102	/// or Bankrupt) without going through the full FinalizeReward /
   103	/// TaskBankruptcy flow. The state-flip itself is exercised by TB-8 +
   104	/// TB-11 integration tests.
   105	fn seed_task_market(q: &mut QState, task: &str, state: TaskMarketState) {
   106	    let mut entry = TaskMarketEntry::default();
   107	    entry.state = state;
   108	    q.economic_state_t
   109	        .task_markets_t
   110	        .0
   111	        .insert(TaskId(task.into()), entry);
   112	}
   113	
   114	/// Build a genesis QState with the given balances AND a single
   115	/// task_markets_t entry in Open state for the given task. Used by the
   116	/// happy-path tests post Gemini Q13 gate (mint/seed reject closed/missing
   117	/// events).
   118	fn genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(
   119	    pairs: &[(&str, i64)],
   120	    task: &str,
   121	) -> QState {
   122	    let mut q = genesis_with_balances(pairs);
   123	    seed_task_market(&mut q, task, TaskMarketState::Open);
   124	    q
   125	}
   126	
   127	/// Build a QState that simulates a post-mint snapshot — `mint_owner`
   128	/// has minted `mint_amount_micro` against `task` (event_id) and the
   129	/// task_markets_t state has been flipped to `final_state`. Used by
   130	/// redeem-focused tests so they don't have to drive the actual mint
   131	/// dispatch (which now requires task state == Open per Gemini round-2
   132	/// CHALLENGE Q13 remediation). The post-mint Q-projection is identical
   133	/// to what the dispatch arm would produce.
   134	fn genesis_post_mint(
   135	    pairs: &[(&str, i64)],
   136	    mint_owner: &str,
   137	    task: &str,
   138	    mint_amount_micro: i64,
   139	    final_state: TaskMarketState,
   140	) -> QState {
   141	    let mut q = genesis_with_balances(pairs);
   142	    seed_task_market(&mut q, task, final_state);
   143	
   144	    let agent_id = AgentId(mint_owner.into());
   145	    let event_id = EventId(TaskId(task.into()));
   146	
   147	    // Debit balance.
   148	    let bal = q
   149	        .economic_state_t
   150	        .balances_t
   151	        .0
   152	        .get(&agent_id)
   153	        .copied()
   154	        .unwrap_or(MicroCoin::zero());
   155	    q.economic_state_t.balances_t.0.insert(
   156	        agent_id.clone(),
   157	        MicroCoin::from_micro_units(bal.micro_units() - mint_amount_micro),
   158	    );
   159	
   160	    // Credit collateral.
   161	    q.economic_state_t
   162	        .conditional_collateral_t
   163	        .0
   164	        .insert(event_id.clone(), MicroCoin::from_micro_units(mint_amount_micro));
   165	
   166	    // Credit equal YES + NO shares to the owner.
   167	    let mut owner_shares = std::collections::BTreeMap::new();
   168	    owner_shares.insert(
   169	        event_id,
   170	        ShareSidePair {
   171	            yes: ShareAmount::from_units(mint_amount_micro as u128),
   172	            no: ShareAmount::from_units(mint_amount_micro as u128),
   173	        },
   174	    );
   175	    q.economic_state_t
   176	        .conditional_share_balances_t
   177	        .0
   178	        .insert(agent_id, owner_shares);
   179	
   180	    q
   181	}
   182	
   183	async fn submit_and_apply(h: &mut Harness, tx: TypedTx) -> Result<(), String> {
   184	    h.seq
   185	        .submit_agent_tx(tx)
   186	        .await
   187	        .map_err(|e| format!("submit error: {e:?}"))?;
   188	    let outcome = h
   189	        .seq
   190	        .try_apply_one(&mut h.rx)
   191	        .ok_or_else(|| "no envelope drained".to_string())?;
   192	    outcome
   193	        .map(|_ledger_entry| ())
   194	        .map_err(|e| format!("apply error: {e:?}"))
   195	}
   196	
   197	fn build_mint(parent: turingosv4::state::q_state::Hash, owner: &str, task: &str, micro: i64, seq_no: u64) -> TypedTx {
   198	    TypedTx::CompleteSetMint(CompleteSetMintTx {
   199	        tx_id: TxId(format!("mint-{owner}-{task}-{seq_no}")),
   200	        parent_state_root: parent,
   201	        event_id: EventId(TaskId(task.into())),
   202	        owner: AgentId(owner.into()),
   203	        amount: MicroCoin::from_micro_units(micro),
   204	        signature: AgentSignature::from_bytes([0u8; 64]),
   205	        timestamp_logical: 1000 + seq_no,
   206	    })
   207	}
   208	
   209	fn build_redeem(
   210	    parent: turingosv4::state::q_state::Hash,
   211	    owner: &str,
   212	    task: &str,
   213	    outcome: OutcomeSide,
   214	    units: u128,
   215	    seq_no: u64,
   216	) -> TypedTx {
   217	    TypedTx::CompleteSetRedeem(CompleteSetRedeemTx {
   218	        tx_id: TxId(format!("redeem-{owner}-{task}-{seq_no}")),
   219	        parent_state_root: parent,
   220	        event_id: EventId(TaskId(task.into())),
   221	        owner: AgentId(owner.into()),
   222	        outcome,
   223	        share_amount: ShareAmount::from_units(units),
   224	        resolution_ref: ResolutionRef {
   225	            resolution_tx_id: TxId(format!("resolution-fixture-{task}")),
   226	            claimed_outcome: outcome,
   227	        },
   228	        signature: AgentSignature::from_bytes([0u8; 64]),
   229	        timestamp_logical: 2000 + seq_no,
   230	    })
   231	}
   232	
   233	fn build_seed(
   234	    parent: turingosv4::state::q_state::Hash,
   235	    provider: &str,
   236	    task: &str,
   237	    micro: i64,
   238	    seq_no: u64,
   239	) -> TypedTx {
   240	    TypedTx::MarketSeed(MarketSeedTx {
   241	        tx_id: TxId(format!("seed-{provider}-{task}-{seq_no}")),
   242	        parent_state_root: parent,
   243	        event_id: EventId(TaskId(task.into())),
   244	        provider: AgentId(provider.into()),
   245	        collateral_amount: MicroCoin::from_micro_units(micro),
   246	        signature: AgentSignature::from_bytes([0u8; 64]),
   247	        timestamp_logical: 3000 + seq_no,
   248	    })
   249	}
   250	
   251	// ── SG-13.1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   252	
   253	/// SG-13.1 — Mint 1 Coin → 1 YES + 1 NO, total Coin conserved.
   254	#[tokio::test]
   255	async fn sg_13_1_mint_one_coin_yields_one_yes_plus_one_no_total_coin_conserved() {
   256	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 100)], "task-A");
   257	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   258	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   259	
   260	    submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_mint(parent, "alice", "task-A", 5_000_000, 1))

exec
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba tests/tb_13_complete_set.rs | sed -n '260,620p'" in /home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4
 succeeded in 0ms:
   260	    submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_mint(parent, "alice", "task-A", 5_000_000, 1))
   261	        .await
   262	        .expect("mint accepted");
   263	
   264	    let q = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap();
   265	    let alice_bal = q
   266	        .economic_state_t
   267	        .balances_t
   268	        .0
   269	        .get(&AgentId("alice".into()))
   270	        .copied()
   271	        .unwrap();
   272	    assert_eq!(
   273	        alice_bal.micro_units(),
   274	        100_i64 * 1_000_000 - 5_000_000,
   275	        "alice balance must be debited by mint amount"
   276	    );
   277	
   278	    let collateral = q
   279	        .economic_state_t
   280	        .conditional_collateral_t
   281	        .0
   282	        .get(&EventId(TaskId("task-A".into())))
   283	        .copied()
   284	        .unwrap();
   285	    assert_eq!(collateral.micro_units(), 5_000_000, "collateral credited");
   286	
   287	    let pair = q
   288	        .economic_state_t
   289	        .conditional_share_balances_t
   290	        .0
   291	        .get(&AgentId("alice".into()))
   292	        .and_then(|m| m.get(&EventId(TaskId("task-A".into()))))
   293	        .copied()
   294	        .unwrap();
   295	    assert_eq!(pair.yes.units, 5_000_000_u128, "YES shares minted equal to amount");
   296	    assert_eq!(pair.no.units, 5_000_000_u128, "NO shares minted equal to amount");
   297	
   298	    // CTF preserved across mint via 6-holding sum (Atom 3 invariant).
   299	    let q_pre = QState::genesis();
   300	    let mut q_pre_balanced = q_pre.clone();
   301	    q_pre_balanced.economic_state_t.balances_t.0.insert(
   302	        AgentId("alice".into()),

   304	    );

   306	        &q_pre_balanced.economic_state_t,
   307	        &q.economic_state_t,
   308	        &[],
   309	    )
   310	    .expect("CTF preserved across mint");
   311	    assert_complete_set_balanced(&q.economic_state_t).expect("complete-set balanced post-mint");
   312	}
   313	
   314	// ── SG-13.2 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   315	
   316	/// SG-13.2 — YES/NO shares are not counted in total Coin supply.
   317	///
   318	/// Asserts that `assert_total_ctf_conserved` passes pre/post a mint that
   319	/// creates 5_000_000 YES + 5_000_000 NO shares — if shares were
   320	/// double-counted as Coin, the post sum would be 10_000_000 micro larger
   321	/// than the pre sum and the assertion would fail.
   322	#[tokio::test]
   323	async fn sg_13_2_yes_no_shares_not_in_total_coin_supply() {
   324	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 50)], "task-Z");
   325	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0.clone());
   326	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   327	
   328	    submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_mint(parent, "alice", "task-Z", 12_345_678, 2))
   329	        .await
   330	        .expect("mint accepted");
   331	
   332	    let q = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap();
   333	    // Pre/post 6-holding total must be equal — the conditional shares
   334	    // do NOT contribute to total_supply_micro per CR-13.3.
   335	    assert_total_ctf_conserved(&q0.economic_state_t, &q.economic_state_t, &[])
   336	        .expect("shares are not Coin; sum unchanged");
   337	    assert_complete_set_balanced(&q.economic_state_t).expect("balanced");
   338	}
   339	
   340	// ── SG-13.3 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   341	
   342	/// SG-13.3 — MarketSeedTx fails if provider lacks balance.
   343	#[tokio::test]
   344	async fn sg_13_3_market_seed_fails_if_provider_lacks_balance() {
   345	    // Bob has NO balance row at all. Task-S is pre-Open so Q13 gate
   346	    // (event state) passes; the balance gate is the one that fires.
   347	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 100)], "task-S");
   348	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   349	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   350	
   351	    let err = submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_seed(parent, "bob", "task-S", 1_000_000, 3))
   352	        .await
   353	        .expect_err("seed must fail without provider balance");
   354	    assert!(
   355	        err.contains("InsufficientBalanceForMint"),
   356	        "expected InsufficientBalanceForMint, got: {err}"
   357	    );
   358	}
   359	
   360	// ── SG-13.4 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   361	
   362	/// SG-13.4 — MarketSeedTx cannot create liquidity without collateral
   363	/// (architect §4.7 forbidden list "No automatic liquidity").
   364	#[tokio::test]
   365	async fn sg_13_4_market_seed_cannot_create_liquidity_without_collateral() {
   366	    // Task-X is pre-Open so the Q13 event gate is not the one firing;
   367	    // the zero-collateral gate is.
   368	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 100)], "task-X");
   369	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   370	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   371	
   372	    // collateral_amount == 0 must fail with InsufficientCollateral.
   373	    let err = submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_seed(parent, "alice", "task-X", 0, 4))
   374	        .await
   375	        .expect_err("seed with zero collateral must fail");
   376	    assert!(
   377	        err.contains("InsufficientCollateral"),
   378	        "expected InsufficientCollateral, got: {err}"
   379	    );
   380	}
   381	
   382	// ── SG-13.5 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   383	
   384	/// SG-13.5 — Redeem unavailable before outcome resolution.
   385	///
   386	/// Mint shares; submit redeem when task_markets_t state is `Open`; expect
   387	/// `RedeemBeforeResolution`. Per architect FR-13.4: "CompleteSetRedeemTx
   388	/// is impossible before system-resolved outcome."
   389	#[tokio::test]
   390	async fn sg_13_5_redeem_unavailable_before_outcome_resolution() {
   391	    // Sub-test 1: mint into Open task succeeds; immediate redeem against
   392	    // the still-Open task is rejected with RedeemBeforeResolution.
   393	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 100)], "task-O");
   394	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   395	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   396	
   397	    submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_mint(parent, "alice", "task-O", 5_000_000, 5))
   398	        .await
   399	        .expect("mint accepted");
   400	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   401	
   402	    let err = submit_and_apply(
   403	        &mut h,
   404	        build_redeem(parent, "alice", "task-O", OutcomeSide::Yes, 1_000_000, 6),
   405	    )
   406	    .await
   407	    .expect_err("redeem before resolution must fail");
   408	    assert!(
   409	        err.contains("RedeemBeforeResolution"),
   410	        "expected RedeemBeforeResolution, got: {err}"
   411	    );
   412	
   413	    // Sub-test 2: Expired-state task with pre-baked post-mint state
   414	    // (mint was rejected by Q13 gate when state==Expired, so we use
   415	    // genesis_post_mint to construct the state directly). Redeem is
   416	    // rejected with RedeemBeforeResolution.
   417	    let q1 = genesis_post_mint(
   418	        &[("bob", 100)],
   419	        "bob",
   420	        "task-E",
   421	        2_000_000,
   422	        TaskMarketState::Expired,
   423	    );
   424	    let mut h2 = fresh_harness(q1);
   425	    let parent = h2.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   426	    let err = submit_and_apply(
   427	        &mut h2,
   428	        build_redeem(parent, "bob", "task-E", OutcomeSide::No, 500_000, 8),
   429	    )
   430	    .await
   431	    .expect_err("redeem on expired must fail");
   432	    assert!(
   433	        err.contains("RedeemBeforeResolution"),
   434	        "expected RedeemBeforeResolution on Expired state, got: {err}"
   435	    );
   436	}
   437	
   438	// ── SG-13.6 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   439	
   440	/// SG-13.6 — Redeem after YES outcome pays YES, not NO.
   441	#[tokio::test]
   442	async fn sg_13_6_redeem_after_yes_outcome_pays_yes_not_no() {
   443	    // Use pre-baked post-mint state with task=Finalized — mint dispatch
   444	    // would now reject Finalized state per Q13 gate, so we build the
   445	    // post-mint state directly to focus the test on redeem semantics.
   446	    let q0 = genesis_post_mint(
   447	        &[("alice", 100)],
   448	        "alice",
   449	        "task-Y",
   450	        4_000_000,
   451	        TaskMarketState::Finalized,
   452	    );
   453	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   454	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   455	
   456	    submit_and_apply(
   457	        &mut h,
   458	        build_redeem(parent, "alice", "task-Y", OutcomeSide::Yes, 4_000_000, 10),
   459	    )
   460	    .await
   461	    .expect("redeem yes accepted");
   462	
   463	    let q = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap();
   464	    let alice_bal = q
   465	        .economic_state_t
   466	        .balances_t
   467	        .0
   468	        .get(&AgentId("alice".into()))
   469	        .copied()
   470	        .unwrap();
   471	    // 100 Coin = 100_000_000 micro; -4M (mint) +4M (yes redeem) = 100M unchanged.
   472	    assert_eq!(
   473	        alice_bal.micro_units(),
   474	        100_000_000_i64,
   475	        "alice balance restored after YES redeem"
   476	    );
   477	
   478	    let pair = q
   479	        .economic_state_t
   480	        .conditional_share_balances_t
   481	        .0
   482	        .get(&AgentId("alice".into()))
   483	        .and_then(|m| m.get(&EventId(TaskId("task-Y".into()))))
   484	        .copied()
   485	        .unwrap();
   486	    assert_eq!(pair.yes.units, 0_u128, "YES shares debited (winning side)");
   487	    assert_eq!(pair.no.units, 4_000_000_u128, "NO shares preserved (losing side)");
   488	
   489	    // Now attempt redeem outcome=No on the SAME finalized event — must fail
   490	    // because state is Finalized (YES wins) and the claimed_outcome is No.
   491	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   492	    let err = submit_and_apply(
   493	        &mut h,
   494	        build_redeem(parent, "alice", "task-Y", OutcomeSide::No, 1_000_000, 11),
   495	    )
   496	    .await
   497	    .expect_err("redeem outcome=No on Finalized event must fail");
   498	    assert!(
   499	        err.contains("InvalidResolutionRef"),
   500	        "expected InvalidResolutionRef, got: {err}"
   501	    );
   502	
   503	    // Symmetric check: Bankrupt event with outcome=Yes must fail; with
   504	    // outcome=No must succeed. Use pre-baked post-mint state.
   505	    let q_b = genesis_post_mint(
   506	        &[("bob", 50)],
   507	        "bob",
   508	        "task-B",
   509	        1_000_000,
   510	        TaskMarketState::Bankrupt,
   511	    );
   512	    let mut hb = fresh_harness(q_b);
   513	    let parent = hb.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   514	    let err = submit_and_apply(
   515	        &mut hb,
   516	        build_redeem(parent, "bob", "task-B", OutcomeSide::Yes, 500_000, 13),
   517	    )
   518	    .await
   519	    .expect_err("Bankrupt with outcome=Yes must reject");
   520	    assert!(err.contains("InvalidResolutionRef"));
   521	    let parent = hb.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   522	    submit_and_apply(
   523	        &mut hb,
   524	        build_redeem(parent, "bob", "task-B", OutcomeSide::No, 500_000, 14),
   525	    )
   526	    .await
   527	    .expect("Bankrupt with outcome=No must succeed");
   528	}
   529	
   530	// ── SG-13.7 / SG-13.8 — fence delegation ────────────────────────────────────
   531	//
   532	// SG-13.7 (no f64 in CompleteSet/MarketSeed path) and SG-13.8 (no
   533	// import/use of legacy CPMM in TB-13 modules) are enforced by Atom 0.5
   534	// forward-fence in `tests/tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs`. This file
   535	// records the delegation contract.
   536	
   537	/// SG-13.7 (delegation marker) — `no_f64_in_new_complete_set_or_market_seed_path`
   538	/// is enforced by `tests/tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs::no_f64_in_complete_set_or_market_seed`.
   539	/// This test exists to make the architect SG-13.7 ship gate visible in
   540	/// the TB-13 integration test surface (per `feedback_workspace_test_canonical`
   541	/// + ship gate exact-name discipline).
   542	#[test]
   543	fn sg_13_7_no_f64_in_new_complete_set_or_market_seed_path() {
   544	    // Delegation: see tests/tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs.
   545	    // This test passes by construction: any f64 leak would be caught by
   546	    // the forward-fence test at workspace time. We assert the delegation
   547	    // is in place by checking the fence file exists and contains the
   548	    // expected SG-13.0.2 test name.
   549	    let fence_src = std::fs::read_to_string(
   550	        std::path::Path::new(env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR"))
   551	            .join("tests/tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs"),
   552	    )
   553	    .expect("fence test file must exist");
   554	    assert!(
   555	        fence_src.contains("fn no_f64_in_complete_set_or_market_seed"),
   556	        "SG-13.0.2 fence delegation broken: missing target test name"
   557	    );
   558	}
   559	
   560	/// SG-13.8 (delegation marker) — `no_import_or_use_of_legacy_cpmm_in_tb13_modules`
   561	/// is enforced by `tests/tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs::legacy_cpm_api_not_imported_by_complete_set`.
   562	#[test]
   563	fn sg_13_8_no_import_or_use_of_legacy_cpmm_in_tb13_modules() {
   564	    let fence_src = std::fs::read_to_string(
   565	        std::path::Path::new(env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR"))
   566	            .join("tests/tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs"),
   567	    )
   568	    .expect("fence test file must exist");
   569	    assert!(
   570	        fence_src.contains("fn legacy_cpm_api_not_imported_by_complete_set"),
   571	        "SG-13.0.1 fence delegation broken: missing target test name"
   572	    );
   573	}
   574	
   575	// ── Halting-trigger guards (architect §4.8) ─────────────────────────────────
   576	
   577	/// Halt: total_supply_micro must be unchanged across mint+redeem.
   578	#[tokio::test]
   579	async fn halt_total_supply_micro_unchanged_across_mint_redeem() {
   580	    // Use pre-baked post-mint state with task=Finalized; the post-mint
   581	    // QState reflects the would-be result of a successful mint into an
   582	    // Open task. Compare against the genesis (pre-mint balance) to
   583	    // verify total supply bit-equality. After redeem, alice's balance
   584	    // is restored.
   585	    let q_genesis = genesis_with_balances(&[("alice", 100)]);
   586	    let q0 = genesis_post_mint(
   587	        &[("alice", 100)],
   588	        "alice",
   589	        "task-H1",
   590	        7_000_000,
   591	        TaskMarketState::Finalized,
   592	    );
   593	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   594	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   595	    submit_and_apply(
   596	        &mut h,
   597	        build_redeem(parent, "alice", "task-H1", OutcomeSide::Yes, 7_000_000, 21),
   598	    )
   599	    .await
   600	    .expect("redeem");
   601	
   602	    let q = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap();
   603	    // q_genesis vs q (post-redeem) — both should have alice at 100 Coin
   604	    // (genesis 100; mint -7M; redeem +7M = 100). The pre-baked post-
   605	    // mint state had collateral, but post-redeem collateral is 0.
   606	    // Comparison must add task_markets_t state in pre as Finalized too,
   607	    // or we use a different baseline. Simpler: check 6-holding sum is
   608	    // the same as q_genesis.
   609	    let genesis_with_finalized_market = {
   610	        let mut g = q_genesis.clone();
   611	        seed_task_market(&mut g, "task-H1", TaskMarketState::Finalized);
   612	        g
   613	    };
   614	    assert_total_ctf_conserved(
   615	        &genesis_with_finalized_market.economic_state_t,
   616	        &q.economic_state_t,
   617	        &[],
   618	    )
   619	    .expect("total_supply_micro bit-equal pre/post (mint→redeem cancels out)");
   620	    assert_complete_set_balanced(&q.economic_state_t).expect("balanced");

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	//! TB-13 Atom 0.5 — Legacy CPMM forward-fence + label ship-gate.
     2	//!
     3	//! TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 0.5 (architect 2026-05-03 ruling Part A §4.2;
     4	//! SG-13.0.1 / SG-13.0.2 / SG-13.0.3).
     5	//!
     6	//! These three tests enforce the forward-binding fence that NEW TB-13
     7	//! modules cannot import or reuse the legacy `src/prediction_market.rs`
     8	//! f64 CPMM scaffolding. Architect §4.2 halting triggers:
     9	//!
    10	//!   HALT if new TB-13 code imports legacy prediction_market.rs.
    11	//!   HALT if f64 appears in new CompleteSet / MarketSeed code.
    12	//!   HALT if any AMM / CPMM router function is introduced in TB-13.
    13	//!
    14	//! ## What is "TB-13 code"?
    15	//!
    16	//! A span of Rust source belongs to TB-13 iff it is a contiguous block
    17	//! of non-blank lines whose first non-blank line contains an authoring
    18	//! marker that identifies TB-13 as the contributing tracer-bullet (NOT
    19	//! a forward-reference from an earlier-TB doc-comment to TB-13's future
    20	//! work). Authoring markers:
    21	//!
    22	//!   - `TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 ` (TB-12 convention used by every shipped TB).
    23	//!   - A line that begins with `// TB-13 ` after stripping leading
    24	//!     whitespace + comment markers.
    25	//!   - A line that begins with `//! TB-13 ` (module-level doc).
    26	//!   - A line that begins with `/// TB-13 ` (item-level doc).
    27	//!
    28	//! A span ends at the next blank line OR end-of-file. Cross-references
    29	//! to TB-13 from inside a TB-12 (or earlier) span do NOT pull that span
    30	//! into TB-13 scope — only the *first non-blank line* of a span is
    31	//! checked for the authoring marker.
    32	//!
    33	//! ## File set in scope
    34	//!
    35	//! - `src/state/typed_tx.rs` — TB-13 typed-tx variant additions (Atom 1).
    36	//! - `src/state/q_state.rs` — TB-13 EconomicState extensions (Atom 2).
    37	//! - `src/state/sequencer.rs` — TB-13 dispatch-arm additions (Atom 2).
    38	//! - `src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs` — TB-13 conservation extensions (Atom 3).
    39	//! - `src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs` — TB-13 §14 dashboard rendering (Atom 4).
    40	//!
    41	//! At Atom 0.5 ship time, none of these files contain `TB-13` markers
    42	//! (TB-12 is the latest contributor). The fence passes trivially. As
    43	//! Atom 1..4 land, markers appear and the fence enforces the rule.
    44	
    45	use std::fs;
    46	use std::path::PathBuf;
    47	
    48	/// Statically-listed in-scope source files for the TB-13 forward-fence
    49	/// Layer 1 (unconditional whole-file scan for hard-banned imports).
    50	/// Codex round-2 CHALLENGE remediation 2026-05-03: this list is now
    51	/// a *floor* — `discover_tb_13_files()` walks `src/` for any additional
    52	/// file containing a TB-13 authoring marker and adds it to the
    53	/// effective scope.
    54	const FENCE_SCOPE_FLOOR: &[&str] = &[
    55	    "src/state/typed_tx.rs",
    56	    "src/state/q_state.rs",
    57	    "src/state/sequencer.rs",
    58	    "src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs",
    59	    "src/bin/audit_dashboard.rs",
    60	    "src/runtime/verify.rs",
    61	];
    62	
    63	/// Tokens forbidden inside any TB-13-marker span (architect §4.2 halting
    64	/// triggers + §4.7 forbidden list).
    65	///
    66	/// Each entry is a literal substring that must NOT appear in TB-13 code.
    67	const FORBIDDEN_LEGACY_TOKENS: &[&str] = &[
    68	    // Direct legacy CPMM imports / type names.
    69	    "prediction_market::",
    70	    "BinaryMarket",
    71	    // Legacy CPMM API method names.
    72	    ".buy_yes(",
    73	    ".buy_no(",
    74	    "open_bounty_market",
    75	    "bounty_market",
    76	    "bounty_lp_seed",
    77	    "bounty_yes_price",
    78	    "resolve_bounty",
    79	    "market_ticker(",
    80	    "market_ticker_full(",
    81	    // f64 in money-path context (see SG-13.0.2 dedicated test for the
    82	    // primary check; this entry catches `f64` in any TB-13-marked span).
    83	    " f64",
    84	    "f64,",
    85	    "f64;",
    86	    "f64)",
    87	    // Trading / AMM / orderbook concepts forbidden in TB-13 (per §4.7).
    88	    "MarketOrderTx",
    89	    "MarketTradeTx",
    90	    "MarketBuyTx",
    91	    "MarketSellTx",
    92	    "AMM",
    93	    "CPMM",
    94	    "DPMM",
    95	    "orderbook",
    96	    // Price-as-truth concepts (deferred to TB-14 per §5).
    97	    "price_yes",
    98	    "price_no",
    99	    "PriceIndex",
   100	    "yes_price",
   101	    "no_price",
   102	    "RationalPrice",
   103	];
   104	
   105	fn workspace_root() -> PathBuf {
   106	    let manifest = env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR");
   107	    PathBuf::from(manifest)
   108	}
   109	
   110	/// Returns true if `line` is an authoring marker for TB-13 (i.e., the
   111	/// line declares that the following block is TB-13 code, NOT a forward-
   112	/// reference from an earlier-TB doc-comment to TB-13's future work).
   113	fn is_tb_13_authoring_marker(line: &str) -> bool {
   114	    if line.contains("TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 ") {
   115	        return true;
   116	    }
   117	    let trimmed = line.trim_start();
   118	    let body = trimmed
   119	        .strip_prefix("//! ")
   120	        .or_else(|| trimmed.strip_prefix("/// "))
   121	        .or_else(|| trimmed.strip_prefix("// "))
   122	        .unwrap_or("");
   123	    body.starts_with("TB-13 ")
   124	}
   125	
   126	/// Extract line ranges that belong to TB-13 additions. A span is a
   127	/// contiguous block of non-blank lines; it is in-scope iff the first
   128	/// non-blank line is an authoring marker per `is_tb_13_authoring_marker`.
   129	fn tb_13_spans(source: &str) -> Vec<(usize, String)> {
   130	    let mut out: Vec<(usize, String)> = Vec::new();
   131	    let lines: Vec<&str> = source.lines().collect();
   132	    let n = lines.len();
   133	    let mut i = 0;
   134	    while i < n {
   135	        if lines[i].trim().is_empty() {
   136	            i += 1;
   137	            continue;
   138	        }
   139	        let span_start = i;
   140	        let mut span_end = i;
   141	        while span_end < n && !lines[span_end].trim().is_empty() {
   142	            span_end += 1;
   143	        }
   144	        let span = &lines[span_start..span_end];
   145	        if is_tb_13_authoring_marker(span[0]) {
   146	            for (offset, line) in span.iter().enumerate() {
   147	                out.push((span_start + offset + 1, (*line).to_string()));
   148	            }
   149	        }
   150	        i = span_end;
   151	    }
   152	    out
   153	}
   154	
   155	/// Read a source file relative to the workspace root, returning its
   156	/// content as a String. Panics with a clear message if missing — fence
   157	/// requires every file in `FENCE_SCOPE_FLOOR` to exist.
   158	fn read_scope_file(rel_path: &str) -> String {
   159	    let full = workspace_root().join(rel_path);
   160	    fs::read_to_string(&full)
   161	        .unwrap_or_else(|e| panic!("TB-13 fence: failed to read {rel_path}: {e}"))
   162	}
   163	
   164	/// Walk `src/` for any `.rs` file containing a TB-13 authoring marker.
   165	/// Codex round-2 CHALLENGE remediation 2026-05-03: closes the gap where
   166	/// a new TB-13 file outside the static `FENCE_SCOPE_FLOOR` list could
   167	/// bypass forbidden-token enforcement. This discovery walk makes the
   168	/// fence self-extending: any new TB-13 contributing module is auto-
   169	/// added to scope on first run.
   170	fn discover_tb_13_files() -> Vec<String> {
   171	    let src_root = workspace_root().join("src");
   172	    let mut found: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
   173	    walk_rs_files(&src_root, &mut |path| {
   174	        let rel = path
   175	            .strip_prefix(workspace_root())
   176	            .unwrap_or(path)
   177	            .to_string_lossy()
   178	            .into_owned();
   179	        let body = match fs::read_to_string(path) {
   180	            Ok(s) => s,
   181	            Err(_) => return,
   182	        };
   183	        if body.lines().any(is_tb_13_authoring_marker) {
   184	            found.push(rel);
   185	        }
   186	    });
   187	    found
   188	}
   189	
   190	fn walk_rs_files(dir: &std::path::Path, visitor: &mut dyn FnMut(&std::path::Path)) {
   191	    let entries = match fs::read_dir(dir) {
   192	        Ok(e) => e,
   193	        Err(_) => return,
   194	    };
   195	    for entry in entries.flatten() {
   196	        let path = entry.path();
   197	        if path.is_dir() {
   198	            walk_rs_files(&path, visitor);
   199	        } else if path.extension().map(|e| e == "rs").unwrap_or(false) {
   200	            visitor(&path);
   201	        }
   202	    }
   203	}
   204	
   205	/// Effective fence scope = FLOOR ∪ discovered. Deduplicated, sorted.
   206	fn effective_fence_scope() -> Vec<String> {
   207	    let mut set: std::collections::BTreeSet<String> = std::collections::BTreeSet::new();
   208	    for s in FENCE_SCOPE_FLOOR {
   209	        set.insert((*s).to_string());
   210	    }
   211	    for s in discover_tb_13_files() {
   212	        set.insert(s);
   213	    }
   214	    set.into_iter().collect()
   215	}
   216	
   217	/// Hard-banned legacy CPMM imports — these strings MUST NOT appear in
   218	/// any FENCE_SCOPE file regardless of TB-13-marker discipline. Codex
   219	/// round-1 Q9 CHALLENGE remediation (2026-05-03): the marker-only fence
   220	/// could be bypassed by writing a legacy import outside a TB-13 doc-
   221	/// comment span. These tokens are unconditionally banned (a `use
   222	/// crate::prediction_market::BinaryMarket` anywhere in scope is an
   223	/// architectural regression even in non-TB-13 sections).
   224	const HARD_BANNED_LEGACY_IMPORTS: &[&str] = &[
   225	    "use crate::prediction_market::",
   226	    "use crate::prediction_market;",
   227	    "crate::prediction_market::BinaryMarket",
   228	    "crate::prediction_market::MarketError",
   229	];
   230	
   231	/// SG-13.0.1 — `legacy_cpm_api_not_imported_by_complete_set`.
   232	///
   233	/// Architect §4.2 halting trigger: HALT if NEW TB-13 code imports legacy
   234	/// `prediction_market.rs`. Two layers of enforcement:
   235	///
   236	/// **Layer 1 (unconditional, Codex round-1 Q9 remediation)**: scan every
   237	/// FENCE_SCOPE file for `HARD_BANNED_LEGACY_IMPORTS` regardless of
   238	/// TB-13-marker discipline. Catches any new use-statement or type
   239	/// reference that pulls legacy CPMM into a TB-13-scope module.
   240	///
   241	/// **Layer 2 (TB-13-marker-scoped)**: scan TB-13-marked spans for the
   242	/// broader `FORBIDDEN_LEGACY_TOKENS` set (API names, trading/AMM
   243	/// concepts). The marker discipline allows benign references in
   244	/// historical doc-comments while keeping new TB-13 code clean.
   245	#[test]
   246	fn legacy_cpm_api_not_imported_by_complete_set() {
   247	    let mut violations: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
   248	    let scope = effective_fence_scope();
   249	
   250	    // Layer 1: unconditional whole-file scan for hard-banned imports.
   251	    for rel in &scope {
   252	        let source = read_scope_file(rel);
   253	        for (line_no, line) in source.lines().enumerate() {
   254	            for token in HARD_BANNED_LEGACY_IMPORTS {
   255	                if line.contains(token) {
   256	                    violations.push(format!(
   257	                        "{rel}:{}: hard-banned legacy import `{token}` — {line}",
   258	                        line_no + 1
   259	                    ));
   260	                }

   245	#[test]
   246	fn legacy_cpm_api_not_imported_by_complete_set() {
   247	    let mut violations: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
   248	    let scope = effective_fence_scope();
   249	
   250	    // Layer 1: unconditional whole-file scan for hard-banned imports.
   251	    for rel in &scope {
   252	        let source = read_scope_file(rel);
   253	        for (line_no, line) in source.lines().enumerate() {
   254	            for token in HARD_BANNED_LEGACY_IMPORTS {
   255	                if line.contains(token) {
   256	                    violations.push(format!(
   257	                        "{rel}:{}: hard-banned legacy import `{token}` — {line}",
   258	                        line_no + 1
   259	                    ));
   260	                }
   261	            }
   262	        }
   263	    }
   264	
   265	    // Layer 2: TB-13-marker-scoped scan for trading/AMM concepts.
   266	    for rel in &scope {
   267	        let source = read_scope_file(rel);
   268	        for (line_no, line) in tb_13_spans(&source) {
   269	            for token in FORBIDDEN_LEGACY_TOKENS {
   270	                // The `f64` family entries are checked in SG-13.0.2 — skip
   271	                // them here so the failure message is unambiguous.
   272	                if token.starts_with(" f64")
   273	                    || token.starts_with("f64,")
   274	                    || token.starts_with("f64;")
   275	                    || token.starts_with("f64)")
   276	                {
   277	                    continue;
   278	                }
   279	                if line.contains(token) {
   280	                    violations.push(format!(
   281	                        "{rel}:{line_no}: TB-13-marked span contains forbidden token `{token}` — {line}"
   282	                    ));
   283	                }
   284	            }
   285	        }
   286	    }
   287	    assert!(
   288	        violations.is_empty(),
   289	        "TB-13 SG-13.0.1 forward-fence violated (scope: {} files):\n{}",
   290	        scope.len(),
   291	        violations.join("\n")
   292	    );
   293	}
   294	
   295	/// SG-13.0.2 — `no_f64_in_complete_set_or_market_seed`. Now uses
   296	/// effective_fence_scope() (auto-discovers new TB-13 files).
   297	///
   298	/// Architect §4.2 halting trigger: HALT if `f64` appears in NEW
   299	/// CompleteSet / MarketSeed code. Money-path types must use integer
   300	/// `MicroCoin` / `ShareAmount`.
   301	#[test]
   302	fn no_f64_in_complete_set_or_market_seed() {
   303	    let mut violations: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
   304	    let f64_tokens = [" f64", "f64,", "f64;", "f64)"];
   305	    for rel in &effective_fence_scope() {
   306	        let source = read_scope_file(rel);
   307	        for (line_no, line) in tb_13_spans(&source) {
   308	            for token in &f64_tokens {
   309	                if line.contains(token) {
   310	                    violations.push(format!(
   311	                        "{rel}:{line_no}: TB-13-marked span contains f64 (`{token}`) — {line}"
   312	                    ));
   313	                }
   314	            }
   315	        }
   316	    }
   317	    assert!(
   318	        violations.is_empty(),
   319	        "TB-13 SG-13.0.2 no-f64-in-money-path violated:\n{}",
   320	        violations.join("\n")
   321	    );
   322	}
   323	
   324	/// SG-13.0.3 — `prediction_market_legacy_quarantined`.
   325	///
   326	/// Architect §4.2 ship gate: legacy CPMM "must be clearly labeled". We
   327	/// enforce that `src/prediction_market.rs` carries the LEGACY module-
   328	/// header doc-comment with the four required tokens (`legacy`,
   329	/// `not constitutional`, `not RSP-M`, `not production market path`)
   330	/// AND that `src/kernel.rs` market-bearing fields carry the `LEGACY`
   331	/// label tying them to the migration path.
   332	#[test]
   333	fn prediction_market_legacy_quarantined() {
   334	    let pm = read_scope_file("src/prediction_market.rs");
   335	    let header = pm
   336	        .lines()
   337	        .take(60)
   338	        .collect::<Vec<_>>()
   339	        .join("\n");
   340	
   341	    let required_label_tokens = [
   342	        "LEGACY",
   343	        "not constitutional",
   344	        "not RSP-M",
   345	        "not production market path",
   346	    ];
   347	    for token in &required_label_tokens {
   348	        assert!(
   349	            header.contains(token),
   350	            "TB-13 SG-13.0.3: src/prediction_market.rs module header missing required \
   351	             label token `{token}`. Header:\n{header}"
   352	        );
   353	    }
   354	
   355	    // Architect §4.2 also requires the doc to name the migration path so
   356	    // future maintainers don't reintroduce the legacy API.
   357	    let migration_tokens = [
   358	        "TB-13",
   359	        "TB-14",
   360	        "CompleteSetMintTx",
   361	        "OBS_TB_12_LEGACY_CPMM_QUARANTINE",
   362	    ];
   363	    for token in &migration_tokens {
   364	        assert!(
   365	            header.contains(token),
   366	            "TB-13 SG-13.0.3: src/prediction_market.rs module header missing migration-path \
   367	             token `{token}`. Header:\n{header}"
   368	        );
   369	    }
   370	
   371	    // Defense-in-depth: kernel.rs market-bearing fields carry LEGACY.
   372	    let kernel = read_scope_file("src/kernel.rs");
   373	    let kernel_struct_idx = kernel
   374	        .find("pub struct Kernel {")
   375	        .expect("TB-13 SG-13.0.3: cannot locate `pub struct Kernel {` in src/kernel.rs");
   376	    let kernel_struct_end = kernel[kernel_struct_idx..]
   377	        .find("\n}\n")
   378	        .map(|off| kernel_struct_idx + off + 2)
   379	        .expect("TB-13 SG-13.0.3: cannot locate end of Kernel struct");
   380	    let kernel_struct_block = &kernel[kernel_struct_idx..kernel_struct_end];
   381	
   382	    for field in ["markets", "bounty_market", "bounty_lp_seed"] {
   383	        let field_marker = format!("pub {field}");
   384	        let field_idx = kernel_struct_block
   385	            .find(&field_marker)
   386	            .unwrap_or_else(|| panic!("TB-13 SG-13.0.3: cannot locate field `{field}` in Kernel struct"));
   387	        // Look for `LEGACY` in the 600 chars preceding the field
   388	        // declaration (covers a multi-line doc-comment block).
   389	        let doc_window_start = field_idx.saturating_sub(600);
   390	        let doc_window = &kernel_struct_block[doc_window_start..field_idx];
   391	        assert!(
   392	            doc_window.contains("LEGACY"),
   393	            "TB-13 SG-13.0.3: Kernel.{field} missing LEGACY doc-comment label. \
   394	             Doc window:\n{doc_window}"
   395	        );
   396	    }
   397	}
